###
---
| | [ Would you eat the Banana on the Wall? ](http://click1.srnemail.com/rnklgvhhgskpssbhpkkqcpwsygptvyysrvqbyrknrtgnww_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)
### _Friday, May 12, 2023_
Fridays finest takes on Modern Art, pasta in the river, and you paid what for Nachos? James and I break it all down for you. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/xhhcrbnnryptyyqntppmdtsykrtjbkkyvbmqkvphvjrhsc_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)
---|---
| [ The Gate is Open they don’t care! ](http://click1.srnemail.com/dttjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhpdchjg_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)
### _Wednesday, May 10, 2023_
I break down the latest from the border in light of Title 42 expiration on Thursday. If you think the border is bad now just wait. Also if you think the border is fine then I can’t help you! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/gcwmrtjjrfkdffpjdkkhcdnfsrdltssfythpsykgylrgmc_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)
| [ What ever happened to the days of real political debates ](http://click1.srnemail.com/lzhhjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdgkwjghk_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)
### _Monday, May 8, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at the history of Political debate and discuss the current demise of political discourse. I encourage each of you to look at the current state of civil discourse and help search for a better way to educate the public during election cycles. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/sjlpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcvrsmvpv_srvkkccvcrvptbklvpsprjj.html)

name: Cherise Trump; Mrs. Trump; C. Trump; Trump
subject: Trinity University Censors My Free Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Speech
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWK4KbcDwN

Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and
forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last
name is Trump.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWK4KbcDwN

Friend,

Trinity
University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me
to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is
Trump. Will you stand with me now and demand the university
reverse this?

That's
right... before I could step foot on campus for my event
promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was
forced to pay for special liability insurance.

The Young
Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they
have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before.

Will you
join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they
should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our
open letter right now.

Stand
with Speech First

Friend,
even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related),
Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and
setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent.

Not only
is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous
political conservative … but it also caters to the "Woke"
student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom
far-left students might find objectionable.

Put
simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors
hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation -
and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left
student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and
free thinking suffer!

After
all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were
Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?

I don't
think so!

Friend,
add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell
Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision …
and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.

They want
you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a
dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need
you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the
Leftist administrators at Trinity University.

Thank you
for your support!

Cherise
Trump
Executive
Director
Speech
First

Stand
with Speech First

Paid for by Speech
First.

1300 I St
NW Suite 400E

Washington, DC 20005

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper._bnG5fHZgQ)Dear Fellow American,
You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government-including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](http://trk.secureandprosper.-UNfBJZjVw)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College|
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMzLWUwYWRiMjFjOTZlYTRmNjA4MWM4NmMyZTYxZTEzYmNmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/n7wHgJbcPG-Ba0DpGiGUCA) to unsubscribe.
---

body:
Will you join me for dinner?

| | Friend,
---
As I've always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters' contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! _
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - _no matter the amount of your gift_ - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don't have to worry about a thing, Friend. I'll take care of it all:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

_And my favorite part, we 'll even take a photo together so that you'll always remember this amazing evening!_

Trump Date: Sun, May 7, 2023 Subject: I came up with an idea I think you'll like To: | Friend, Grassroots donors like you are the bedrock of our MAGA movement. On the eve of my birthday, I'll be hosting a fundraising dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster.... ... So why not offer the chance for a grassroots donor to join us!** If you win, your flight, your accommodation, your delicious meal will all be on me. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkpto7dp2cl682fb202f5jvgeenfvvq89pgb776o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsbk41938v5lajtbsghhc2qmo3a3iss7rhfchn80_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhfna1cbv2538veubr7d9q9i6n2vrii7b1hhop8o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)** It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn4i1t2t5e5oecnceo0u4bttjhedrj7mdtlof9a0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1jks8u830e6nb6dhqbdhag41isv83o363amgo58_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvmpgbedtknf8d4lrre3t596lbjnrpjji5uvm5qg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjhiheppht7e9jcedqhs7p0nrhk8puc4h4qhp86g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today»](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd5okt7nuf5dh4e0d8tu6dknrrh0jt5mn55qmn7o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor2c9h2bs)**
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our team wants to see your performance review TONIGHT

"You Look At What's Happened To Our Country...our Borders Are Bad, Our Military Is Bad...inflation Is Destroying Our Country...it's Something We'll Turn Around On Day One"
_- President Trump, May 10th, 2023_
Friend,

President Trump went on CNN last night and directly faced the American people and the Liberal mainstream media.

You're a trusted supporter and one of the most reliable patriots in YOUR state, Friend. That's why we want you to grade President Trump's performance from his CNN Town Hall.
_Thank you in advance for your participation._
**[President Trump Performance Review](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zacjmr5h714hotdg7vg2civnafaa9it6030fv6eo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjjmaor6c3h2bs)**

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi Elections
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
## Important Elections Coming Soon!
---
| We are now less than 90 days away from the primary elections in Mississippi. In just three months, we’ll have a better understanding of the trajectory of our state moving forward. There are quite a few legislative seats to be watching, and I hope to give you more information about those in subsequent emails, but for now it seems one of the biggest races of the season is the Lt. Governor’s race. State Senator Chris McDaniel is challenging the incumbent, Delbert Hosemann, who the McDaniel camp has disparagingly named “Delbert the Democrat.” The Mississippi Freedom Caucus isn’t endorsing or engaging in the Lt. Governor’s race, but I can personally understand how one may come to acknowledge that the current Lt. Governor is a moderate-at-best Republican.It was under Delbert Hosemann’s Senate that the complete income tax elimination bill was watered down to nothing more than a step-down tax cut, not a complete elimination. It was under Delbert Hosemann that an amendment to extend the covid-19 vaccine style religious exemptions to school age children was thrown out after being ruled as “not germane” to a bill that gave religious exemptions to a vaccine. In the vaccine amendment fight, Chris McDaniel used a rarely utilized parliamentary motion to call into question Delbert’s ruling on the vaccine bill’s amendment, garnering half of the Republicans in the Senate to support McDaniel in the procedure. The parliamentary motion ultimately failed when Delbert received every Democrats’ support against McDaniel.Delbert has championed Obamacare Expansion and supported a bill this year that [I released a statement calling the bill](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/vdbPb8pffYKsn0N33HvPGA) “an attempt at a complete government takeover of our hospital system in Mississippi.” Delbert also championed a bill that would pass out $250 checks to every man, woman, and child this year, instead of returning the massive surplus in the state’s tax coffers to the people that actually paid it; but even his cash handout bill died when the legislature decided instead to blow an extra $700 million on “member” projects in a bill that Gov. Tate Reeves acknowledged may have been passed unconstitutionally for a multitude of reasons. We also saw protectionist bills, anti-free market bills, and the government continuing to grow larger under Hosemann’s reign.We’ve seen no substantial school choice, educational freedom, parental rights bills, or bills to cut the grocery tax make it out of the legislature during Hosemann’s reign. Chris McDaniel has introduced complete income tax elimination bills, 2nd amendment protection bills, fought for parental rights, and medical freedom. All of which died under Delbert Hosemann’s reign. I’ve seen McDaniel’s opponents say he is an “ineffective” lawmaker, but I see the same rhetoric regarding the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. Leadership doesn’t like legislators that won’t bow down to them, killing any bill with their name on it in an attempt to make free thinkers submit.The GOP platform says that we as Republicans believe in “the conservative principles of individual freedom, personal responsibility, free market economic policies, and a society that respects our God-given rights”, and the belief that “government that governs best should be of the people, by the people, and for the people”, and that “people, not government, know best how to spend their own money.” Those are the basic values that platform Republicans should believe in. So, when you read those tenets of our Republican platform, who best comes to mind? Is it Delbert Hosemann, or Chris McDaniel?
---
|
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus continues to work for you as we approach elections. We are vetting candidates and will soon give you our choices for the best candidates to fight for our rights and freedoms.We need your help! Please consider making a donation to help us with this fight.
---
| | [Donate Today ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/A8B52ZNVXrw7NrBU7x7voA)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/YRQ8rcrJnM3BwmmxOv8avA) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

subject: Can you grade President Trump’s Town Hall performance?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our team wants to see your performance review TONIGHT

"You Look At What's Happened To Our Country...our Borders Are Bad, Our Military Is Bad...inflation Is Destroying Our Country...it's Something We'll Turn Around On Day One"
_- President Trump, May 10th, 2023_
Friend,

President Trump went on CNN last night and directly faced the American people and the Liberal mainstream media.

You're a trusted supporter and one of the most reliable patriots in YOUR state, Friend. That's why we want you to grade President Trump's performance from his CNN Town Hall.
_Thank you in advance for your participation._

| Friends and Neighbors,
It has been a whirlwind since winning the May 6 Senate District 10 Convention. It is an honor to serve. Thank you!
My opponents ran a spirited race. Now, fellow Republican must "lock arms" and win in November. Please visit our website [www.mcguireforvirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tQuesckEzo45MIeqfwiPiDc9iFUSd-ogHbCTFEO1JHw6l7U28CO6-fhJ1cxXf-pZJ2PliRwO5eXTkuyUIXTto1dkGeSHtoCM7r_w_RCPZsfSo_qjp_jSRuKW9EMy0Jkl1-iKFL2UFd5WNUAHvVZjVKFOqeExnAsp&c=UIlhFWMhN4Q9CZfvOM63jnYvI5Vv-Z1fxnOmaQ4zsZOI9mQkxVw4NQ==&ch=k1Qu7VTaZm5U-ayBcd4FlacZSYhoYNdN01LEdgz9OAf8rZCFwZ_qUw==) to learn more, donate, get a sign, and or volunteer.
Here is my latest update:

| Thanks to you, we won Amelia County at the convention last week. Delegate Lee Ware and I will be in Amelia today for Amelia Day. Thank you Amelia County GOP Chair Martha Muniz for the invite. We look forward to seeing you, [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tQuesckEzo45MIeqfwiPiDc9iFUSd-ogHbCTFEO1JHw6l7U28CO6-fhJ1cxXf-pZVb1pdrgrV8b-IDpcvxEtjwl9rdfajF938_-RaG3lCTeDeMj5BhuKpMC75iACIsh3XpTtBEazGfRDBD7eoQMC2sWal9MCmU7ftlRtU2j4yagVYBc43XuZTiXCdtr3E2Q5OcxsQMRIMQFSXHADR5NfOSU7JS6fnPeqTQz6XOGTq6ApsIoEl7xOOXfKX5ESxo0a0Kyuat_QruqCUvaXifQXcnEk6mmSHgJpQd43QlVXwiaZfiysGGmi0qiFvf0gwWGaAKD--UJxlaEB_GSbRyIoiHwUvmaps3IkPSXBfJBEg-1mUKNUm8EaSdZt6-xG-nMUlEjG2ikHqUgcmRMkgWGaxxaYdv0e38IlGHY7MRXxqMk=&c=UIlhFWMhN4Q9CZfvOM63jnYvI5Vv-Z1fxnOmaQ4zsZOI9mQkxVw4NQ==&ch=k1Qu7VTaZm5U-ayBcd4FlacZSYhoYNdN01LEdgz9OAf8rZCFwZ_qUw==) for details.

| It is time to get to work. Right after the convention, I was tapped on the shoulder and told to head to Norfolk the next day for the Republican State Senate Caucus Retreat. The retreat was a great opportunity to get to know my colleagues, discuss policies, and strategies for November. Five Republican Senators are retiring this year; Senator Steve Newman, Jill Vogel, Tommy Norment, Emmett Hangar, and John Cosgrove. Thank you for your service to our Commonwealth.

| I attended the New House of Delegates District 56 debate in Fluvanna last week. Fellow delegate Rob Bell, retiring this year, and Joe Thomas moderated the Debate. I am not endorsing in this race. The three candidates are Kevin Bailey, Tom Garrett, and Jenny Wood. Their convention is Saturday May 20 in Cumberland County.

I had the honor of attending a ribbon cutting ceremony in Arlington, VA for the new American Legion Post 139 building that will include the "Gold Standard Digital Hub" to connect veterans and their families to resources, affordable housing, and more.

| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Friends and Neighbors, It has been a whirlwind since winning the May 6 Senate District 10 Convention. It is an honor to serve. Thank you! My opponents ran a spirited race. Now, fellow Republican must "lock arms" and win in November. Please visit our website == to learn more, donate, get a sign, and or volunteer. Here is my latest update: | I Hope to See You Today | == | Thanks to you, we won Amelia County at the convention last week. Delegate Lee Ware and I will be in Amelia today for Amelia Day. Thank you Amelia County GOP Chair Martha Muniz for the invite. We look forward to seeing you, == for details. | Republican State Senate Caucus Retreat | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It is time to get to work. Right after the convention, I was tapped on the shoulder and told to head to Norfolk the next day for the Republican State Senate Caucus Retreat. The retreat was a great opportunity to get to know my colleagues, discuss policies, and strategies for November. Five Republican Senators are retiring this year; Senator Steve Newman, Jill Vogel, Tommy Norment, Emmett Hangar, and John Cosgrove. Thank you for your service to our Commonwealth. | House of Delegates New District 56 Debate | | | | | | | | I attended the New House of Delegates District 56 debate in Fluvanna last week. Fellow delegate Rob Bell, retiring this year, and Joe Thomas moderated the Debate. I am not endorsing in this race. The three candidates are Kevin Bailey, Tom Garrett, and Jenny Wood. Their convention is Saturday May 20 in Cumberland County. | Thank You! | | | | | | | | | | | | | The Gold Standard Digital Hub for Veteran Services | | | | | Vietnam Special Forces Medal of Honor Recipient == | | | | Thank you Governor Glenn Youngkin for taking care of our veterans. I had the honor of attending a ribbon cutting ceremony in Arlington, VA for the new American Legion Post 139 building that will include the "Gold Standard Digital Hub" to connect veterans and their families to resources, affordable housing, and more. | Powhatan Fair | | | | Fellow Delegate Lee Ware and I spoke with constituents at the Powhatan Fair. This fair is will continue this weekend Saturday and Sunday. | More Convention Photos | | | | | | | | | | | | | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

body:
In case you missed AG Jason Miyares’ last email to you...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed2a66608fa98b8dad476990dfe8b0c5a9f0c41dc4090b0417847e0c359c5c6994d19fb05ff6c94b2d83eb850b4d9f13ce)
---
| | Friend - The fight for school choice and parents' rights is incredibly important right now, which is why we're re-upping Jason's email. If you want to fuel AG Miyares' fight to keep woke policies out of our schools and ensure parents are involved, you can **[click here to contribute to his mid-month fundraising goal.](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452edbe2b0f49fbac1392bd846a7d62a41efc385b0aa02579cc67addbfe92c0e629cf62f134b2ffaa699834a9732c71ef8875 "click here to contribute to his mid-month fundraising goal.")** -Team Miyares
\----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: Jason Miyares
Date: May 12, 2023
Subject: notice the trend?
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452edde136f57ddc9148f789a51dff3f94cf7e2e406fc94d5052e26be4b8ac144c9857db51567811bca88625ec2de12a6d214 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friend - There seems to be a common trend with Virginia Democrats: they __continually__ knock parents for wanting to be involved in their children's lives.
---
| | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed2a66608fa98b8dad476990dfe8b0c5a9f0c41dc4090b0417847e0c359c5c6994d19fb05ff6c94b2d83eb850b4d9f13ce)
---
Friend, parents deserve to have a say in what their kids are taught and what school they attend. And all children have a right to receive the same educational opportunities regardless of their race or background. **_[I AGREE >>](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed488fe86a0cee53cf997aa77de2fd9f77e9db81996aac9619751c253d376cc2b5713ecf29df8d80e06bd9768223b4bbc2 "I AGREE >>")_** **I 've taken on the woke schools that violate students' rights under the Virginia Human Rights Act, and I've fought to ensure parents are involved in their children's lives.**
---
| | | [PROTECT PARENTS' RIGHTS](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed2a66608fa98b8dad476990dfe8b0c5a9f0c41dc4090b0417847e0c359c5c6994d19fb05ff6c94b2d83eb850b4d9f13ce)
---
| I take this part of my job very seriously. As a father, I want to ensure my daughters have the same opportunities as their peers while my wife and I have a say in what they're being taught in school. Friend, if I'm going to continue fighting to keep woke policies OUT of our schools and parents IN the loop on their child's education, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to fuel this incredibly important fight. **[Will you rush a donation to help me reach my mid-month goal so I can continue fighting these woke policies throughout the Commonwealth?](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452edd8564a9e04c5cfa6caf86d98009be99a707fa9b85f5d054800c9778f62cfd8c8d9a231f2194fd2a741410d83ceb84d2a "Will you rush a donation to help me reach my mid-month goal so I can continue fighting these woke policies throughout the Commonwealth?")**
---
| | [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed2a66608fa98b8dad476990dfe8b0c5a9f0c41dc4090b0417847e0c359c5c6994d19fb05ff6c94b2d83eb850b4d9f13ce) |
---|---|---
| | | [RUSH IN NOW](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=ca4410f094f452ed2a66608fa98b8dad476990dfe8b0c5a9f0c41dc4090b0417847e0c359c5c6994d19fb05ff6c94b2d83eb850b4d9f13ce)
---
Thank you,
Jason Miyares

| Dear Friends,
Please join me for my re-elect campaign kickoff next Saturday morning, May 20th, at the Lake Jackson Volunteer Fire Department in Manassas!
Over the last four years, you've joined me as we've fought for lower property taxes, a safer community, and sensible, citizen-first development. With your help and a new governing majority committed to these issues we will once again make Prince William County the best place in our commonwealth to live, work, and raise a family.

name: Melinda Shaw
subject: Thrown in jail for taking a criminal off the streets?
body:
My name is Melinda Shaw, and I'm the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw of the Bladen County Sheriff's Office.

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, My name is Melinda Shaw, and I'm the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw of the Bladen County Sheriff's Office.
---
| | That's Michael and me with our children in the picture I've included. **I know we've never met - but if you would move heaven and earth to protect your family, then I pray that you'll understand why I'm writing to you today.** As you may know, it's a difficult and dangerous time to be in law enforcement. Officers across America have targets on their back just for wearing the uniform... it seems every time I read the news, another police officer has been gunned down during a routine traffic stop or ambushed during a call.
---
|
---
| | So, I knew full well the dangers of Michael's job. We both did - though that never stopped me from worrying every time he left the house for work. I never imagined our worst nightmare would come at the hands of the local district attorney. You see, on October 8, 2021, Michael was involved in a **high-speed chase with a career criminal which resulted in Michael using minor - and necessary force - to apprehend the felon and now, my husband being charged with crimes that could put him in prison for many years... for doing his job.** It started when he made a traffic stop of a criminal named William Cain, a convicted felon whom Michael had arrested before. During the stop, Michael saw firearm ammunition in Cain's glove compartment and that there were several missing rounds. As a convicted felon, Cain was prohibited from possessing ammunition - so naturally, Michael was concerned the suspect was also illegally carrying a firearm. Suddenly, Cain hit the gas and took off. Michael and his partner sprinted for their squad cars and followed. The criminal led them on a dangerous 11+-mile high-speed chase before crashing into a dark pond in a rural, unlit area. I'm thankful no one was hurt in the chase, but what came next is equally horrifying for my family. **You see, Michael and his partner apprehended Cain as he came up the bank of the pond and then tried to arrest him, but Cain decided to resist arrest while still near the bank of the water and a struggle ensued.** Finally, Michael and his partner were able to handcuff him at the edge of the pond after Michael was forced to use necessary strikes to subdue him. There was no serous injury, only lacerations. Cain was now in custody and the threat to Michael - and the community -- was over. But three weeks later, the local prosecutor charged Michael with felony assault for that very minor use of necessary force. **If he 's found guilty, Michael could spend many years in prison. Locked away from our three children, Hunter (30), Anna Grace (24) and Harlie (13).** Friend, as a mother and the wife of a police officer, I'm used to planning for the worst. But I was in complete shock when we learned about the criminal charge. I used to imagine having to tell our children that daddy had been seriously injured and was in the hospital. Or that worse, he wasn't coming home. But how do you tell your children that daddy isn't coming home because our very own government is the one prosecuting him for doing his job? _My mind races at night thinking about what I will do if Michael is sent to prison._ _ _ So right now, I'm trying to stay focused on the biggest problem we're facing: how are we going to pay for Michael's defense? Defending an officer in a case like this can cost hundreds of thousands of dollars. But raising three children on one police officer's salary means we don't have that kind of money in our bank account. The answer to our prayers came when we received a call from Jason Johnson, President of Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF), who had heard about Michael's case. LELDF defends good officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. They have generously offered to help pay for Michael's legal defense. But first they have to raise money for a trial, which will require many dozens of hours of legal research, expert witnesses, legal motions and all sorts of advocacy efforts. To be honest, Friend, I'm not used to asking for help. But today I'm going to take a deep breath and ask you one of the hardest questions I've ever asked another person: [**Will you help LELDF fight for my husband by making a donation of any amount today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c9575cd2fd2434c815ef052c03f0e35&_e=8AC1eL9-SmR1kBkbmAVa37Heo6kEvJ_BreFl9vFRH629rpvUcTLcw-GrSXfgIsq38XruSmp5XSFZ7wM792lUD7-_5Wem-YegP08asvHCr-Hc8R_6wgFScv-Hw8PhX7S2U_3iLQkc9rtsZXClk_QgsYPcVU9B06FE6g1NsxVc6yajzKTpSSk2LUTjJe5s6cd_obgK4Z8f_GBjy160r-2vihbaz42EcIOM7sXqbXOSBhHv3i54L9vDWf2Ruc3bXgHZ6sspuWvRvxGxOjF45XkuUbfHizT9DQAy6M5jNP8BgdB1z0cimZenBQu_P9AcTqukt510apDRWReP2cStNIvTE245MOTJE0_7RoVCmPnNoFU%3D) Your gift is tax-deductible. And it will help us pay for Michael's trial and help other innocent law enforcement officers who've been unfairly charged, too. My friend, I know we've never met. But I hope you'll find it in your heart to help LELDF fight for my husband. [**Whether you can send $10 or $100, your contribution could be the difference**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c9575cd2fd2434c815ef052c03f0e35&_e=8AC1eL9-SmR1kBkbmAVa37Heo6kEvJ_BreFl9vFRH629rpvUcTLcw-GrSXfgIsq38XruSmp5XSFZ7wM792lUD7-_5Wem-YegP08asvHCr-Hc8R_6wgFScv-Hw8PhX7S2U_3iLQkc9rtsZXClk_QgsYPcVU9B06FE6g1NsxVc6yajzKTpSSk2LUTjJe5s6cd_T3yZmegJr9XkPWgmcxYGAv2GKi3WvfrqyHOjtf984XuJLWn_5qjwxdyeSXhSu67nt6vUqIpdbFTVczQ5ldou9JqBolHWCwvTDVdp_NJ1UiLRjGB9tVRZkXnaljs7ea5_MePSNjSn0A01WjtzYPfYT7qbqdpwfnt5g8DL67dWThs%3D) between letting my husband rot in prison for ten years for a crime he didn't commit... or keeping him at home with his family where he belongs. After the hell we've been through, my family will be forever grateful for your contribution and support. People like you remind me that there is still good in this world. May God bless you.

body:
Let me explain everything:

| |

| | | Friend,

I come to you today with a heavy heart. I just met with my finance team, and our fundraising numbers aren't looking too good.

Each and every day, I am reminded of how much of a tremendous honor it is to represent MO-02 in Congress. I have met many great people and pride myself on all my work for Missourians.

I was born and raised in Missouri and am proud to be a loyal Conservative. I am a dedicated Christian and a former Ambassador. Additionally, I am a proud mother and grandmother. Since taking office, I have been focused on strengthening our economy, fixing our healthcare system, securing our southern border, and everything else in-between.

_But I can 't continue to fulfill my promises without some help._

So, I'm asking you this: _**[Can you chip in just $5 (yes, JUST $5!) to help me keep my promises? name: Full Mag News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=943cf00459f34d00bb845eba5518110e&_e=ZW2zEKFaznMQ8cwg1VuCd-anfb_k9SRBJlJvyi18ZRWV2ryWmy1BochOl8c8azl-LiU5zR4U62DAxiM-GUVQJyA3l50_030I_iRWkXzUpNznZsznSWnKNJ7Px3avMAC7xMfba1p7isSQpbn988Uk5NN_9WRd46Q7GdQuID9HI0oxHfZkgfxIIahnRjkVAgFxuV2WbHk1kZ55mwSSfIpMdzPq1ThvadWFpzSRqqIOCfWeAJl_R3g0vnXrwGGiQAQCrMkAWrd_Jngq8PhRXVujB0R4fuYrTvmyS1_WEv9arO0WCnwtiHW36UrMSrvqK1dNtQ51qyUX93G58YvcxTA6oZe2-NDZ4F-WK0iPio1U93ZcmlpOK5VBbEg0zqMQaUTCTeNo3v-zPf7BA1eMyHhJgbp9iKHc6chTuDjYDOO30OHkOP6eT5HuKqt_yEm2M11i)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=943cf00459f34d00bb845eba5518110e&_e=ZW2zEKFaznMQ8cwg1VuCd-anfb_k9SRBJlJvyi18ZRWV2ryWmy1BochOl8c8azl-LiU5zR4U62DAxiM-GUVQJyA3l50_030I_iRWkXzUpNznZsznSWnKNJ7Px3avMAC7xMfba1p7isSQpbn988Uk5NN_9WRd46Q7GdQuID9HI0oxHfZkgfxIIahnRjkVAgFxuV2WbHk1kZ55mwSSfIpMdzPq1ThvadWFpzSRqqIOCfWeAJl_R3g0vnXrwGGiQAQCrMkAWrd_Jngq8PhRXVujB6pG_TOJNMRe9iKPSlnNcAiiWXTG2vfxIEn6slfggOSk_1fPfCj686EfX6j4FUnu58g-I8H0z0_VSm5x4I0no3bPypZKckMwG7SWs5P-kjJs-fDAtC7sBEKYOtzpI9FGNO2kvAnUTkrCMT_oCDIeXfX0BPXP0fixJkAE8B9cs70R)

clean_body: I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| Dear Friends,
Please join me for my re-elect campaign kickoff next Saturday morning, May 20th, at the Lake Jackson Volunteer Fire Department in Manassas!
Over the last four years, you've joined me as we've fought for lower property taxes, a safer community, and sensible, citizen-first development. With your help and a new governing majority committed to these issues we will once again make Prince William County the best place in our commonwealth to live, work, and raise a family.

body:
We keep saying it...Because it's true.

| Dear Reader, We keep saying it... Because it's true. It doesn't matter what cycles through the news... Like former President Trump being arrested in New York Or how the market reacts... Market Wizard Larry Benedict continues to generate wins for his subscribers. What's his secret? He doesn't invest the traditional way... He doesn't "buy and hold." And he doesn't trade the way a traditional broker would tell you to. Larry's been using this type of strategy for decades. As a hedge fund manager, it helped him deliver $95 million to his clients during the 2008 financial crisis. And now Larry's revealing his unique trading strategy - including a 10-second demo of him in action. If you've been losing money in the markets... name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e9c35a5e4694adc9beed6f9803ffee0&_e=5clZ7FMJ-tybHmWloj3gXaLMLxuEXtnNPt-0d9zUwGWrGx8re2tg5HuiljVa41t4YZkIVzoryFOLqCUcIWvgYMe8Y9yMDzdxaFNl8euCfQC6aHKvZ31fNNw-4VfXos51JzDkOxLGccANLEWaZbmNg95gnFbLyi9RDaTrX7uyEz5hvDp_WyBQqbQxT4PHz0r_Zwjc5IRRLncpwD8o16pt3qhOxyh_2kAoBTXRwE7zCTCA2D7o1bDIrIwiAsgrO2flPXEZoWks3kZCKgVnngMd05qYg-G8hT8cH-CTw5mzTnwuHdph4Al6WRxQlSjqeHqmgnqwiaJzlMC31tvVP7XHeynkSXujOXhaV5FFSm8jJ70DrDgJtkVmhf6Y2NBWA-bbKWz0_YoG5KU_PNBpcnjQ_g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e9c35a5e4694adc9beed6f9803ffee0&_e=5clZ7FMJ-tybHmWloj3gXaLMLxuEXtnNPt-0d9zUwGWrGx8re2tg5HuiljVa41t4YZkIVzoryFOLqCUcIWvgYMe8Y9yMDzdxaFNl8euCfQC6aHKvZ31fNNw-4VfXos51JzDkOxLGccANLEWaZbmNg95gnFbLyi9RDaTrX7uyEz5hvDp_WyBQqbQxT4PHz0r_Zwjc5IRRLncpwD8o16pt3qhOxyh_2kAoBTXRwE7zCTCA2D7o1bDIrIwiAsgrO2fl3d2oyoReOJ83R_tQqELAwEwx9PBPU9r2Xu4XHsXVJ0AF2l0air0DA5CwjHtRIur0eGAwKHKM5_JGaTJbdyveLi7Kl9IGiPp0qm8LPe_npSKbm_A3F0U45bPC44zBTfD87pWwOQVHw2bzPnB4dhdCfg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e9c35a5e4694adc9beed6f9803ffee0&_e=5clZ7FMJ-tybHmWloj3gXaLMLxuEXtnNPt-0d9zUwGWrGx8re2tg5HuiljVa41t4YZkIVzoryFOLqCUcIWvgYMe8Y9yMDzdxaFNl8euCfQC6aHKvZ31fNNw-4VfXos51JzDkOxLGccANLEWaZbmNg95gnFbLyi9RDaTrX7uyEz5hvDp_WyBQqbQxT4PHz0r_Zwjc5IRRLncpwD8o16pt3qhOxyh_2kAoBTXRwE7zCTCA2D7o1bDIrIwiAsgrO2flAndaqLpef6IzvZ2Dwm_Q2yQPj60ZfwRdrwirt4an1MYIPmQolewO1KFrRpl7wT-qwJbr06MajOFp6f6kIM-Qa5PycjqP6dUJAUQhDGpFQfBMQtQqAD-5JCeYUvB_bWROc26EXWQ7KdFsYhPnxTCIIA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

>
Whether it's been standing up to big banks, leading on landmark legislation for individuals with disabilities, or working to prevent campus sexual assault, Bob Casey fights for the people who need a fighter on their side.
Recently, we teamed up to support rolling back the Trump-era deregulation of big banks like Silicon Valley Bank and First Republic. We’ve fought to make trade policy work for American workers. We investigated Postmaster General and Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy for sabotaging the mail during the 2020 election. And we can count on Bob Casey to stay in the fight for families.
**Bob Casey is a fighter for the middle class in Pennsylvania and across the country. We need to do all we can to keep him in the Senate. But I’ll just be blunt: this will be a tough battleground election.**
MAGA GOP operatives are already circling Pennsylvania like vultures, scheming to pick off Bob Casey and get that much closer to taking back the Senate. And you know the big banks and powerful special interests would love to knock him out of the game.
Some of the potential Republican contenders so far: a former hedge fund CEO, and a guy who paid to bus Pennsylvanians to Donald Trump’s rally on January 6 — not to mention, who was at the U.S. Capitol that day.
But no matter who the GOP throws into this race — even if it’s not a guy who can’t stop babbling about crudité — this will be one of the most competitive, most critically important Senate races of 2024.

subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3deff7bcf3db460aaf7915c54189805d&_e=64Lxwn_Gn_AyCvqwFeg_nElFoxT7Ic8gYqrSZMV5SSFMvFRQUSNNOWmvKP_R8XH5RKlta0bOTbnlA0XWOudd6xUDw2fZRYvuj79alJt3oNU3h_KBg6Cn5x4BP64lk9B4XNEjUxfKR4AOJgbEaOSaL14v3LSsjbP5bUVqfP1X4M-1oHYGlm7Z2k0rr2iL_7U7oqgg78C5afywSY300SaNcLZ9JDHUSAZP1EHS0fR_cQQgL9RCUG4eHj9eB0uURCn9DP4nLWi22Vt60YEjv9BtisUlV4kGoQNJqmbg53LUz5BxjqkQH1UOJ2nLf_3bkjfF5-ccWIsAJVFHnsVMCFzrpc8wwrbJTR01SATRpS6Pjc_j9VB_UFh-9CJwS5gtRTNZ3ctuTTPaax1Q7DcY2ngymKyPCUteXkROMYoY2DTFcE--hsfkJ41XVQTDSjzP9Moo2AqlIOuFMcEEk5lh3ctJKQ%3D%3D)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3deff7bcf3db460aaf7915c54189805d&_e=64Lxwn_Gn_AyCvqwFeg_nElFoxT7Ic8gYqrSZMV5SSFMvFRQUSNNOWmvKP_R8XH5RKlta0bOTbnlA0XWOudd6xUDw2fZRYvuj79alJt3oNU3h_KBg6Cn5x4BP64lk9B4XNEjUxfKR4AOJgbEaOSaL14v3LSsjbP5bUVqfP1X4M-1oHYGlm7Z2k0rr2iL_7U7oqgg78C5afywSY300SaNcLZ9JDHUSAZP1EHS0fR_cQQgL9RCUG4eHj9eB0uURCn9DP4nLWi22Vt60YEjv9BtisUlV4kGoQNJqmbg53LUz5BxjqkQH1UOJ2nLf_3bkjfFm1tDBXibHU4LxbapJAOoxGpnt1VNfxQWSP_mqh4K2xyOw3sThOqpV8L03baaOW7arI6Dxqhtb26gXQCA6BO1lJNcKHyfhTCZyXKm_pJwnMhrBcWLcENVI3c2CdAJQxbKM6KG4guWVZz91DKzRmPDMQ%3D%3D)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3deff7bcf3db460aaf7915c54189805d&_e=64Lxwn_Gn_AyCvqwFeg_nElFoxT7Ic8gYqrSZMV5SSFMvFRQUSNNOWmvKP_R8XH5RKlta0bOTbnlA0XWOudd6xUDw2fZRYvuj79alJt3oNU3h_KBg6Cn5x4BP64lk9B4XNEjUxfKR4AOJgbEaOSaL14v3LSsjbP5bUVqfP1X4M-1oHYGlm7Z2k0rr2iL_7U7oqgg78C5afywSY300SaNcLZ9JDHUSAZP1EHS0fR_cQQgL9RCUG4eHj9eB0uURCn9DP4nLWi22Vt60YEjv9BtisUlV4kGoQNJqmbg53LUz5BxjqkQH1UOJ2nLf_3bkjfFPpvScAfEbGFr9NzelJ2xkxmmm1z_6ThEk4rvIgry6ZpdD2CqCCRCMioGXf5Z8xll66G_nIpnzbnMuv9egb_M4AR5BJ8pMY0o-5j-hJTIR2fo4SQXX8w8POwehsc_wbgxtsXNBQeOKtk0HY4c1erlmQ%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

clean_body: I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots. | | | | | Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration. As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan? Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants. | | Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all! | | Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2? I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be NO amnesty for illegal immigrants. "Are you with me?" I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots. | | Thank you for your time and patriotic support, | Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Kroger no more pesticide-contaminated food
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770454?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell Kroger to STOP selling food grown with _CANCER-LINKED_ pesticides!** [**Take action now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770455?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) You should be able to walk into a grocery store and pick fresh produce off the shelves without concern that the food contains pesticides. But that’s not guaranteed. Right now, **Kroger is selling food grown with toxic pesticides!** Neonics -- a common class of pesticides used to grow the food that Kroger and other grocers sell -- have been linked to **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and other serious health issues.** These are not chemicals we want to be feeding to our families and children. But Friends of the Earth found them in Kroger brand applesauce and spinach. Despite the mounting evidence that toxic pesticides are harmful to people and the planet, Kroger continues to sell pesticide-contaminated food to its customers. [**Please, Friend, will you tell Kroger to STOP selling food grown with pesticides linked to CANCER and other health issues? Send a message by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770456?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
A recent study found that**80% of adults and children -- who are especially vulnerable -- had traces of a pesticide called glyphosate** in their bodies. We found glyphosate, aka Roundup, on Kroger brand oat cereal and beans. Glyphosate is linked to serious health problems, including cancer.
And I haven’t even touched on the worldwide impact toxic pesticides are having on pollinators, Friend. Neonics can _**KILL BEES ON CONTACT.**_ We rely on bees and other pollinators for one in three bites of food, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees, **we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at **higher risk of heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer,** according to a recent study.
But there’s still hope. We can produce organic food without toxic pesticides sustainably and at-scale, protecting our health and the health of our planet -- it just requires people like you to continue fighting back. **With Kroger’s upcoming Annual General Meeting, NOW is a critical time to act! [Please take immediate action and together, we can help PROTECT people, pollinators, and the planet from toxic pesticides!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paolo Mutia
Food and agriculture campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32615bc271a24fd6bf2a8aa8e74dd78d&_e=dFuCTk6Hj36mZ5RXsjSUbOcDeLwtyi_NLLUwichC_NxuTOuKJND5Cx37UUo9181Rzp_AybK1lRT3KFJE78aIXW_SYO2zv-PfUEyc2hEeuax7WDxTxEYsGFo2YTPIJy86y3MWxXU0MI2ZgpflswdzjLZQQBL6QEgbxMFBCenYaURs9br3vD8dqAHY8NGVw8humSGO7pXvKjz9sNmVW8S5Py3tZ6D7c6Z2whqRN_9HevZfsvhIh8iTuNsTnZnlBpuQnQAzisT1SKKjLA8D5aD3Fsox4BSOrlyh6VnusAfltQC65HwouOh_qriKNPPB0vindSBACRmizU9hU-btlT1Eur1k1NqF9yK0G89c4WZ1TsD7TUDiQLdgCJrvM1g-w3IMr_gosZA9dmZlKgBqBvXWNZWj29aAAIzm5FxZpeHJ-JJ-HIYA0DSjL-uI6_ZeBLRSTcGLaB8egP08qsGC3OlrKSCi3iXZvSxZFl2xNn9ebzg%3D "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

If you are not "dpwillis67@gmail.com", please delete this memo. | | | "READ THE MEMO >>" | | | "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it." A Personal Note from Marco Rubio: My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream. I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal. However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it. "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:" | "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM" "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:" We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country. The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next: 1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other. 2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy. "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW."** | "STOP THE DEMS" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. [**Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a0a9df1-18ce-4a24-b7d0-2d093a223753/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats on the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time!

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Are our police systemically racist? - update from Mississippi’s conservative think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133044?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Over the past few years, we have been told that America’s police and criminal justice process are systemically racist.**
The police, it is implied, are inherently unfair in their treatment of African Americans and other minorities. Prosecutors and the courts, it has often been suggested, are much harsher in their treatment of certain groups. Systemic racism, some tell us, explains different outcomes when it comes to criminal justice.
**The narrative of systemic racism is nonsense - but it needs to be exposed as nonsense or it risks becoming dangerous nonsense.**
Rafael Mangual, who came to Jackson last week, is a senior fellow of the Manhattan Institute. His book, _Criminal (In)Justice_ reveals that the supposed biases of the criminal justice system are nothing of the sort.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=48b5fbad66&e=5703353baa)
---
| According to Mangual’s research, different outcomes in the criminal justice system are not reflective of any supposed biases of the system. They reflect differences in behavior.
**Crime in America, particularly violent crime, is hyper concentrated both geographically and demographically.** This might be an uncomfortable truth for some, but the truth needs to be acknowledged. Moreover, as Mangual, and others have shown, the victims of violent crime in America are disproportionately African American.
**When left unchallenged, the narrative of systemic racism undermines law enforcement It has enabled radical activists – often aided by well-meaning conservatives – to advance an anti-police / anti-prison agenda over the past decade.**
Citing the fallacy of police discrimination, activists have successfully demanded that the police be less proactive in arresting wrong doers. There has been a large decline in the number of arrests made in America each year since 2010.
Radical reformers have also demanded that public prosecutors go easy on those that break the law. They have even advanced an anti-prison agenda, claiming that felons should not face jail time.**America’s prison population is today 25 percent lower than it was in 2011, and the incarceration rate in Mississippi has fallen significantly in the past two decades.**
These reforms, introduced in the mistaken belief that America’s criminal justice system is discriminatory and unfair, have had disastrous consequences – especially for the minority communities that the reformers claimed they want to help.

Below is a graph from the Wall Street Journal, citing data from JAMA. It shows the firearm homicide rates for men by race.
---
|
---
| **During the 1990s, when get tough measures were taken to reduce violent crime, the firearm homicide rate for African American men fell dramatically. When the current wave of reforms started to take effect from about 2015, homicide rates for African American men soared.**
Is the criminal justice system, now that it has less proactive arrests, less prosecution and shorter sentencing, doing a better job today for African American men?
Here in Mississippi in 2014-16, well-meaning conservatives introduced legislation to overhaul sentencing laws. They did so claiming that there were better ways to reduce crime than by filling the prisons.
How did that work out?
In 2013, the year before policies were introduced to reduce the rate of incarceration, 28 people were murdered in Jackson per 100,000 people. By 2021, almost four times that many people, 101 per 100,000 people in our capital city were homicide victims.
**Despite what is often claimed, Mississippi does not have a problem with over incarceration.** Since 2002, the prison incarceration rate in our state fell from 1,207 per 100,000 to 916 per 100,000 by 2021. Mississippi’s incarcerated population decreased from 21,008 in January 3, 2014 to 16,931 by January 3, 2022, a decrease of 19.4 percent.
**The reduction in the incarceration rate in our state has been mirrored by a significant rise in violent crime. If you quit locking up bad people, you free them to do bad things to good people.**
Rather than measure the rate at which we lock people up relative to the number of people in our state, perhaps we ought to measure the incarceration rate against the level of criminality in our state.
There is nothing credible about claims that America’s criminal justice process is systemically prejudice. Such claims must not be allowed to undermine the effectiveness of the fight against crime.
Nor is there anything good or noble about misguided criminal justice reforms that allow offenders to reoffend. It is time to that these truths were spelt out.
Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=69ecc0569a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Here's the thing: Experts estimate that a national ban on assault weapons could cut deaths in mass shootings by a WHOPPING 70%. It's a no-brainer. President Biden is on board, but we need Congress to act NOW. Do you agree that it's long overdue for Washington to ban assault weapons? = | = ---|--- Thanks for your input, Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | ** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. She’s also the first announced guest for Senator Joni Ernst’s annual Roast and Ride in June. Take a look at this week's highlights. The End of Title 42: Chaos Continued On Thursday, Joe Biden allowed Title 42 to expire. That’s after Border Patrol announced 10,000 border crossings per day—the highest daily total ever recorded—for at least three days in a row! Now, every state in America is a border state. As Biden fails to close our border, Nikki is stepping up and sharing what she’ll do to secure our border as president. As the only presidential candidate to visit the southern border, Nikki continued to hammer Joe Biden for his border crisis in a new campaign video and several media hits. I could not be prouder of what we accomplished in our first legislative session for Maryland.
All 10 of the bills I introduced _passed_. Those include lots of anti-poverty measures like increasing the minimum wage to $15/hour next January, creating an optional paid service year for high school grads, and increasing access to banking in low- and moderate-income communities.
We also helped increase access to gender-affirming care for transgender Marylanders. And, thanks to overwhelming support, we all will get to vote to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution next year – making Maryland a safe haven for abortion care, birth control, and IVF.
But as we've also seen, there will always be those who try to move us backwards. Individuals driven by greed or fear or hate who will hurt others for their own gain. So we cannot rest on our laurels.
**I am committed to spending every day making sure that I, Lt. Gov. Aruna Miller, and our state legislature live up to my campaign promise – to leave no one behind.**
To do that, I'm still relying on your support to keep our work going.
**[So, I’m asking, if you believe no Marylander should be left behind and are proud of what we did in our first legislative session, will you pitch in your first donation of $5 or more so we can continue the work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63226670/406041787/1077680223?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230513mm2_wm_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDAwMjMyNS05MGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ee6eqeF-xZ727baiUnmv38gKbmuE9wlBtUvLbzGiQ9k=)**
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin=20for=20State=20Representative?=
subject: Help Secure the Border
body:
Vote today | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-525355?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **EARLY VOTING ENDS ON SATURDAY**
---
| Hey Everybody, if you’ve been watching the news this week, **you will find yourself disgusted like I am about the failure of leadership we are witnessing on the southern border.** President Biden has failed to act yet again, and tens of thousands of unidentified people are streaming into our country with no accountability.**This must stop.**

While Florida is not a direct border state, **_we are seeing the impact here with rising crime rates related to fentanyl and human trafficking_**. I will stand with Gov. Ron DeSantis to fully fund our law enforcement and protect our state from Joe Biden’s failures.

We will send a strong signal to the national media with this election. **Today is the last day for early voting in the State House District 24 election.** I am your conservative Republican nominee, and I’d be honored to have your support.

**May God bless you and the Free State of Florida.**

Truly yours,
P.S. The Democrats are attacking us hard, trying to force a low turnout and sell the message that conservatives simply aren’t motivated in Florida. Let’s prove them wrong. Vote today or Tuesday, Election Day, March 16th!
---
| | **RYAN CHAMBERLIN, ENDORSED BY CONSERVATIVE LEADERS!**
---
|
---
|
---
| [Early Voting Locations](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=cf99b55ce7&e=d1c1b9864f "Early Voting Locations")
---
| [ ](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=0e318e76c7&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| | **IMPORTANT VOTING INFORMATION**
---
| **Special General Election**

Only registered voters who live within House District 24 are eligible to vote in this election.

Voter Registration Deadline: April 17, 2023

**Early Voting: May 6, 2023, to May 13, 2023, Sites open from 10 AM to 6 PM**

Mail Ballot Request Deadline: May 6, 2023, by 5 PM
Mail ballots must be received by the Supervisor of Elections office by 7 PM Election Day to be counted

**Election Day: May 16, 2023 - Polls open from 7 AM to 7 PM **

---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=5e424ca538&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---

Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
You may never get a better chance to chat with a Hollywood icon. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63227683/406045803/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_OT_GEN_GEN_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFhZDFiMS05MWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBybhsmkJsBAGILnQ_ga4LzQ922T64DXo6_ITmD3zfw=)
---
Hey team — Our event with Jane Fonda starts on Zoom at noon today, and it's not too late to join Helen and Jane! [**Use this link to donate any amount, even $1, to get the signup link for the event.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63227684/406045804/-1160502658?refcode=AU_HHG_OT_GEN_GEN_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFhZDFiMS05MWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBybhsmkJsBAGILnQ_ga4LzQ922T64DXo6_ITmD3zfw=) You may never get a better chance to chat with a Hollywood icon, and you'll be helping make Philly greener, cleaner, and better for everyone. Please join us. **\- - - - FORWARDED MESSAGE - - - -** Dear friends, Jane Fonda here! I'm excited to personally invite you to a special **virtual fundraiser for Helen Gym on Saturday, May 13, at 12 PM ET.[Click here and donate any amount for access to the virtual event with me and Helen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63227685/406045805/402720276?refcode=AU_HHG_OT_GEN_GEN_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFhZDFiMS05MWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBybhsmkJsBAGILnQ_ga4LzQ922T64DXo6_ITmD3zfw=)** | | **Virtual Fundraiser with Jane Fonda**
* * *
**Saturday, May 13, 12 PM ET**
Virtual Event: Link shared upon RSVP
_All proceeds support Helen Gym for Mayor_ | [RSVP HERE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63227686/406045806/402720276?refcode=AU_HHG_OT_GEN_GEN_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFhZDFiMS05MWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBybhsmkJsBAGILnQ_ga4LzQ922T64DXo6_ITmD3zfw=)
---
I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC last year because we need to elect leaders who share our commitment to safeguarding the environment and fighting against the fossil fuel industry. Helen is committed to doing the hard work it will take to pass key climate policy as Mayor, and we need to show as much support as we can before Election Day.
**As a name-your-price ticket event, your donation will help ensure Helen’s message reaches as many voters as possible — on the airwaves, on the phone, and at their front doors in this pivotal last stretch (and if you give $250, you’ll gain access to a meet and greet with myself and Helen).**
Your generous contribution will go a long way in helping Helen do the critical work of addressing the climate crisis in Philadelphia, and serve as an example for other cities across the country. Together, we can create a brighter, more sustainable future for all.
Thank you in advance for your support, and I look forward to seeing you at the virtual fundraiser.
Warm regards,
_**Jane Fonda**_
Jane Fonda Climate PAC
P.S. Can't make it to the event but still want to support Helen? clean_body: You may never get a better chance to chat with a Hollywood icon. | = Hey team — Our event with Jane Fonda starts on Zoom at noon today, and it's not too late to join Helen and Jane! = You may never get a better chance to chat with a Hollywood icon, and you'll be helping make Philly greener, cleaner, and better for everyone. Please join us. \- - - - FORWARDED MESSAGE - - - - Dear friends, Jane Fonda here! I'm excited to personally invite you to a special virtual fundraiser for Helen Gym on Saturday, May 13, at 12 PM ET.= | | Virtual Fundraiser with Jane Fonda Saturday, May 13, 12 PM ET Virtual Event: Link shared upon RSVP All proceeds support Helen Gym for Mayor | = I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC last year because we need to elect leaders who share our commitment to safeguarding the environment and fighting against the fossil fuel industry. Helen is committed to doing the hard work it will take to pass key climate policy as Mayor, and we need to show as much support as we can before Election Day. As a name-your-price ticket event, your donation will help ensure Helen’s message reaches as many voters as possible — on the airwaves, on the phone, and at their front doors in this pivotal last stretch (and if you give $250, you’ll gain access to a meet and greet with myself and Helen). Your generous contribution will go a long way in helping Helen do the critical work of addressing the climate crisis in Philadelphia, and serve as an example for other cities across the country. Together, we can create a brighter, more sustainable future for all. Thank you in advance for your support, and I look forward to seeing you at the virtual fundraiser. Warm regards, Jane Fonda Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. Can't make it to the event but still want to support Helen? You can still = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com | Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
