We have the chance to give this movement the boost it needs over the next 72 hours — but we’re going to need your help to get there.
#
Peter,
Time is flying by, and our movement still has a lot of work to do before the half-year mark.
We have the chance to give this movement the boost it needs over the next 72 hours — but we’re going to need your help to get there, Peter.
**That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise an additional 150 contributions from emails just like this one to help build our movement’s strength ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline.** [**And we’re counting on supporters like you to help us reach this goal and keep our momentum going. Will you make a contribution now to keep our plans on track?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41910?refcode=em20230513-2476&t=1&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41910?refcode=em20230513-2476&t=2&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)**
**Pramila is tackling big issues both in Congress and in her community.** From fighting back against transphobic legislation to championing progressive priorities like Medicare for All, immigration reform, and more — she’s showing up for our movement. And right now, she’s counting on our grassroots movement to show up for her and our collective work.
If we want to accurately and efficiently plan our campaign's organizing path, continue to fight for critical progressive policies, and support Pramila’s work as she fights for us in Congress, it’s crucial that our finances can keep pace with our momentum.
Now more than ever, our democracy needs movements like ours to champion the rights that we deserve. [**You can help power our work by making a contribution of any amount today and ensure that we have the tools and resources to make a big impact.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41910?refcode=em20230513-2476&t=3&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41910?refcode=em20230513-2476&t=22&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)**
Let’s do this,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230513-2476-footer&t=23&refcode2=2476_420207_aIqXRL&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2476%2E420207%2EaIqXRL)

Peter, Hakeem and I have a lot in common.
Hakeem didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
He was raised by working-class parents in Brooklyn and received his education through the New York City public school system.
I’m so proud of what Hakeem has accomplished and I also know he’s just getting started.
I know we can take back the House and continue to fight for the voiceless and vulnerable – but we can only win if we all work together.
[_**Peter, our work is only possible because of the help of grassroots donors like you. And with fights as large and vital as ours, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goals. I’m calling on 2,485 Democrats to step up before midnight to stop extreme MAGA Republicans and make the American Dream a reality for all our families. So I have to ask: Can I count on you to split a gift between me and Hakeem to power our fight for progress? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63249257/406111068/-1077551363?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_james_30_op_v3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI0NDVmYS1iN2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6uAExAxAK4cCtR6uZTzQPLcbCnOnWuiHS3T0dlvH7jk=)
Thank you for being on our side,
Letitia James
New York Attorney General

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Income inequality isn't the problem...
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxhE2cDNJ

While these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of
income inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality
actually increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is
all income inequality necessarily a bad thing?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxhE2cDNJ

Dear
Friend,
There is
a lot of talk these days about the idea of income inequality.

While
these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of income
inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality actually
increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is all income
inequality necessarily a bad thing?

Hoover
Research Fellow David Henderson addresses these urgent questions
and more in his thought-provoking new commentary for the Hoover
Institution, Income Inequality Isn't the Problem.

From
showing how income inequality could be a good thing in the right
circumstances, to showing from the data that poverty in America
is actually on the decline, this brief but thought-provoking
commentary is truly a must read, if you care about our nation's
future economic success.

Friend, I
invite you to read what I think is one of the strongest counter
arguments to the prevailing rhetoric on this hot-button issue
today.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of Income Inequality Isn't
The Problem right now.

Thank
you,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

#
Derek —
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23-tub.ohqQOR&refcode=em230513-1-15&t=1&akid=8427%2E3013755%2EVAT9bG)
You might remember Tommy Tuberville as the Senator who has been holding up nearly 200 senior Military promotions for THREE MONTHS. We’ve been on his case for a while now.
While he was defending this ridiculous and dangerous position, he managed to get in some kind words for white nationalists.
_Reporter: Do you believe they should allow white nationalists in the military?_
_Tuberville: Well, they call them that. I call them Americans._
Are you kidding? This guy is unbelievable. He even went on to stick up for the terrorists who stormed the Capitol on January 6th.
We can't even believe this has to be said: **There is no place for white nationalists in the Military.**
We’re the group of Veterans fighting Tommy Tuberville and the extreme social agenda he’s trying to impose on our Military. And if we’re ever going to kick dangerous fringe radicals like them out of positions of power, we need your support.
**[Make your first $5 donation to VoteVets today. We’re going to put it to work making the hardest hitting ads of this cycle, calling voters and knocking doors in critical swing districts, taking back the House, and holding the Senate in 2024.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23-tub.ohqQOR&refcode=em230513-1-15&t=2&akid=8427%2E3013755%2EVAT9bG)**

clean_body: = Hey Peter, As you may have heard, one of my most radical opponents in the Louisiana governor's race has just received an endorsement from Donald Trump. Trump has thrown his weight and resources behind Jeff Landry with this endorsement. Because of this new development in my race, I am asking for your help fighting back against our opponent and his recent Trump endorsement. My team and I have set up a $10,000 Fightback Fund over the next three days to help my campaign stay competitive against Trump's recent involvement in this race. We need your support to make this fund a success. The future of our state depends on who wins this race, and completing this fund will help us get the lead. No matter how small, every donation will make a difference in our fight to move Louisiana forward. With your help, we can ensure that Trump's endorsement doesn't go unchallenged. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = All my thanks, Shawn Wilson | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: re: My way of saying THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Will you join me for dinner?

| | Friend,
---
As I've always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters' contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! _
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - _no matter the amount of your gift_ - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don't have to worry about a thing, Friend. I'll take care of it all:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

_And my favorite part, we 'll even take a photo together so that you'll always remember this amazing evening!_
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount - _truly, even just $1_ - to be automatically entered to win.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9ef2b5cff8e49e3a05c86f91ff3ae7a&_e=Q9T1MpfxcJ6UJngT_SE-jKMmLcw5-h4da3T4HojKU5RjaFtm2RTf4wambLZTX1dfEHnET5VjdLZj4XVvTSh_sKTYyxwAvIrZYOg1GJib_gftEl8woGUdvLwWDGzAGc16To5UzE8gQfGUNna0J8D-9PYxgz86qIy3h8-L1fPO45u4yBx2bT5V5348FwnCqic7993i9Rqj-Yhpbfs7ZAjXsK27De-l7xstdZTdRfYhPMihCu2LLHxc5Piao1HjtrxPbxBBeEcPDqeh6ChoAOwFhdbP-fVvfipws8RUt4oInGR-GM69HP8JCpl60v5FaaHhexsjBdqCPLLRIGNn2fBU4_pMzMr8wNGKekk5qRtu_lOddvjYivUtUVeDROI-mQXlSzYlFbkInPBn7n_0pSFc6g%3D%3D)

\---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Donald J. Trump** Date: Sun, May 7, 2023 Subject: I came up with an idea I think you'll like To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9ef2b5cff8e49e3a05c86f91ff3ae7a&_e=Q9T1MpfxcJ6UJngT_SE-jKMmLcw5-h4da3T4HojKU5RjaFtm2RTf4wambLZTX1dfEHnET5VjdLZj4XVvTSh_sKTYyxwAvIrZYOg1GJib_gftEl8woGUdvLwWDGzAGc16To5UzE8gQfGUNna0J8D-9PYxgz86qIy3h8-L1fPO45u4yBx2bT5V5348FwnCqic7993i9Rqj-Yhpbfs7ZAjXsK27De-l7xstdZTdRfYhPMihCu2LLHxc5Piao1HjtrxP-Tz2pxTGCYdAQ0yWQVQXBEdapciO2sp98gKoYnh9FeLmkdkTMZodaoEFcAg7oQSnkKr4WMt9cDO-1PvdF7BY-2TQzX1qwP6qPLYAAXkfKa5tbqudIJxVZWKUXbRH8hfxfmHjDp6juEilGmWBQvjxmw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Grassroots donors like you are the bedrock of our MAGA movement.
That's why I'm always thinking of ways to show my appreciation for all of your support.
And recently, I just came up with a new great idea...
On the eve of my birthday, I'll be hosting a fundraising dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster....
_**... So why not offer the chance for a grassroots donor to join us!**_
_If you win, your flight, your accommodation, your delicious meal will all be on me. And you can even bring a guest._

And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like YOU are my only special interest. Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - no matter the amount of your gift - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event! body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
A new poll was published yesterday, and Helen has pulled into first place with only three days until Election Day!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]FUND VOTER TURNOUT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

This is encouraging news, and it’s a testament to the hard work of volunteers, donors, and supporters just like you. But polls don’t decide our next mayor — voters do. We can’t let up for one second.

It’s clear that what we’ve been doing is working, so in the final three days, we need to do even more of it:
🚪 Knock even more doors.
📺 Run even more ads.
📋 Host even more neighborhood events.
🎉 And tell even more friends & family about our rally with AOC & Bernie.

Your support has put us in position to win on Tuesday, but we need you to step up once more. Will you donate to our Get Out The Vote Fund — so we can hit our $5,801 goal and finish strong?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=15]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

Let’s leave it all in the field.

To victory,
Helen Gym HQ
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]

| | | Team,

It’s Chuck Schumer, and I want to talk about progress -- but first, **[will you chip in $5 to help us defend our Democratic majority? Every dollar you give will go to keeping the Senate in Democratic hands and fighting for progress >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230513-ChuckSchumer-SchumerWhatWeveDone-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230513-ChuckSchumer-SchumerWhatWeveDone-Pros-sl1&akid=10763%2E9716520%2EsJOLAh)**

It’s amazing to consider just how much our Democratic Senate has already accomplished working alongside President Biden. Together, _we've achieved more in two years than many administrations achieve in eight:_

* We capped the cost of insulin for millions of seniors at $35/month.
* We made historic investments to combat the climate crisis.
* We passed crucial gun safety legislation.
* We confirmed Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.
* We ignited a _historic_ manufacturing boom that will employ **millions** of Americans for **years** to come.

But progress isn’t guaranteed. We have to fight for it _every single day._

These are the stakes, plain and simple: **Defend our majority and keep fighting for a better America, or let Senate control slip away -- and with it, all our hard-earned progress.**

**That’s why I’m asking for your help:****[Chip in $5 to the DSCC before the midnight deadline to help elect Democratic senators who will fight for progress every day >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230513-ChuckSchumer-SchumerWhatWeveDone-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230513-ChuckSchumer-SchumerWhatWeveDone-Pros-sl1&akid=10763%2E9716520%2EsJOLAh)**

Friend,

Appearing at a campaign event, Cleveland businessman and OH GOP Senate Candidate Bernie Moreno said there should be reparations for descendants of white Union soldiers who fought in the Civil War, alluding to the ongoing debate over reparations for descendants of enslaved Black people. [_**⇩ READ HERE ⇩**_](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f05a9d6e19334a349807b97a3fdf89c3&_e=uXWLWJFB2RT_KK3JKiEvKeJvMQQKXULQHjy1V4kFE1m6rj0ZCh5gMTd2t9vSAh6PXRr6AWTI-GuhAgeF4rdby6rxRR90LL3URBG58OyLy4yRPEUeiI5LqMfPWF6p2mTmeE9juZKSP8pPMB3GpSmI_nDHET_RPJlw56gY_2L2vlB2vOs5RBZ8qi5TclVUwROKQFeUgqISmOsW5-ZglNUJ5UQ19RSdhD1yj_iXAOn_50wcHif4uwTcCp9MeuM1yVIzKFl0EkhEkksH_A7SJrRQUbd7XO-sup1DyjOIXJrJUjvKszTRA6D4KbbiuAtSzCYWhbDIUMvaj5BMwo18e_XV-mdKHl6G1uhI9wFLutYvLO19HKMw1qvqtj45KDoT-q2386SybAcJZYrwTp8LMIhwIfwof4P3PvqCZdPJRNbkjgh51rqXKVC9vxSdKXinXem54_lbbnEDeMWWO-XfBPbt7sib-_q4apXCORQP2nXNNugdVVOr1gco-6ZqG79CjwC95jgY87tj1tDPjLf7165z1g%3D%3D)
_" They talk about reparations. Where are the reparations for the people, for the North, who died to save the lives of Black people?"_**Moreno said.**_"I know it 's not politically correct to say that, but you know what, we've got to stop being politically correct."_

clean_body: it is rather despicable | Friend, Appearing at a campaign event, Cleveland businessman and OH GOP Senate Candidate Bernie Moreno said there should be reparations for descendants of white Union soldiers who fought in the Civil War, alluding to the ongoing debate over reparations for descendants of enslaved Black people. " They talk about reparations. Where are the reparations for the people, for the North, who died to save the lives of Black people?"Moreno said."I know it 's not politically correct to say that, but you know what, we've got to stop being politically correct." | It's as simple as this: we're not going to win a GOP Senate majority and STOP THE DEMOCRATS if we embrace left-wing notions of 'reparations' by saying they should go to the white descendants of Union soldiers. We have to offer the rest of the country a positive vision for the future of our country. Every dollar we raise right now will make a monumental difference in shaping the future of states like Pennsylvania.
Grassroots donations have been instrumental in fueling our Democratic success. Together, we’ve achieved remarkable milestones. From expanding health care access to protecting voting rights, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to build a fairer, more inclusive America for all.
Here's how your donation can create an immediate impact:
1. **GOTV Efforts:** Your contribution could enable our party to reach thousands of voters, reminding them of critical elections and urging them to exercise their right to vote. We have the chance to build a better future by ensuring Democrats turn out in force.
2. **Targeted Advertising:** By investing in strategic advertising campaigns, we can effectively communicate our messages and get voters off the sidelines. Gifts from grassroots supporters like you will help Democrats reach every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation.
3. **Grassroots Organizing:** Our volunteers and organizers are the backbone of our movement. With your support, we can provide them with the necessary resources, training, and infrastructure to engage voters, organize events, and foster meaningful connections in states like Pennsylvania.

| | | **Amy Klobuchar and Bernie Sanders introduce new bill to BAN Assault Weapons** **[Show your support! Sign the petition and tell the Senate to pass the bill NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1882b310-a7ac-42a3-af46-e5fb774ff932/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | Senator Amy Klobuchar is fed up. She knows that guns are the leading cause of death among young people in the United States: “Enough is enough. Reinstate the assault weapons ban. We can save lives.” _\- Sen. Amy Klobuchar_ And that’s why she is joining with Senator Bernie Sanders on a bill to ban assault weapons. Republican extremists like Mitch McConnell and Ted Cruz will NEVER stand up to the NRA. But public pressure is building, and it may be possible to peel off some of the less extreme Republicans to pass this bill. But we need to ramp up the pressure if we’re going to fight back against the NRA, the GOP, and their dark money backers to prevent mass shootings and BAN assault weapons for good! [**Add your name now, show your support, and tell the Senate to pass this bill NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0601850-fce8-4103-a17d-df9091ad944e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Countries have borders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | Peter, America is able to be the freest country on Earth because we’re dedicated to keeping our citizens safe.
_But today, Democrats are throwing your safety out the window with their radical open-borders policies._
They’re letting dangerous drugs and criminals pass through our borders and into your communities.
Peter, a country where you fear for your safety can never be a free one.
**it’s time to get serious about securing our border, and we need your help.**
[**Take our OFFICIAL Border Control survey today and let us know if YOU think we should build a Southern border wall.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a0e67103aa374224a4a81bd14fbaa4f0&_e=VFj1ZJjhgw5mwV9ocKDeHfeV8l170j1qzfXHwMvzKyc33TVt9qI6VZEycgjS2D1mUB_rWrOTbWhGqboBr358tv2-jTMF5Xne19_rzH8e9TmaULUItV0S911wOPNRu7_m-t24iGwpeVXvnrXWADzM_67PwYkpxYDJR4VGZFm_jXYHKYxFFX2RaMtT9qOpYKyRrXQ_Jf11NhvXTfZiy6uyEaYeHe0B2t1q7SSkFjXA2f_hJPncfmPkrFDHlF6cF87-VA9J79UkfPsMIYG1_v-uOvjZeZ_09cevtaoW2Nx6vSf5Tc2vzyZeMnJDweeXG-YVebvTc5DpAIWbmWcJL8MV6AzBZnDds1i5GO0yvaSIpvrOTVurV9pLGZu6-zv5-orI)

name: AOTL
subject: The Shape of Things: AL-07
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Learn about barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest.
|
---

**The Shape Of Things: AL- 07**
**The district:** Alabama's 7th congressional district is unique and includes significant portions of Montgomery, Birmingham, and Tuscaloosa. It also crosses the historic Black Belt region of the state, an area with a deep and complex history. In 1992, the state's congressional district boundaries were established to allow Black voters to elect a candidate of their choice, as mandated by the Voting Rights Act of 1965, as amended in 1982. This was a hard-fought victory for grassroots civil rights organizers who fought for years to ensure that every person's voice is heard and their vote counts. Today, the seventh district is represented by Congresswoman Terri Sewell.
**Alabama’s 2021 Map Fails to Fairly Represent the State’s Black Voting Population** : In 2020, the United States conducted its census, and the data revealed some significant shifts in population demographics in Alabama. The data showed that over the past decade, the state's Black population had grown while the white population had fallen. As a result, Black Alabamians now make up more than 27 percent of the state's population and nearly 26 percent of the state's voting-age population. However, despite the growth in the Black population and the potential for two congressional districts where Black voters would have the opportunity to elect their candidate of choice (sometimes referred to as an “opportunity district”), the Republican-led Alabama legislature enacted a least-change congressional map, ignoring the census data.
The current Alabama congressional map only has one Black opportunity district, despite the potential for two, which has raised concerns about minority vote dilution and the disenfranchisement of Black voters in the state. Outside of District 7, the Black community outside of District 7 is cracked among districts 1, 2, and 3 -- even though the Black population in the area is large enough to form a majority of the voting-age population in a second congressional district.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63240106/406077215/1971507452?refcode=20230509_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxOTFlYWQzLTllZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP17_-SsxNVYu7Vjm3eGKHKDgrstw3lEtmPOoJiX71Y=)
---
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation for communities throughout the country. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. **[Will you support All On The Line with a recurring donation of any amount to support our work to advocate for fair maps in places like Alabama and other target states?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63240108/406077217/1971507452?recurring=true&refcode=20230509_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxOTFlYWQzLTllZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP17_-SsxNVYu7Vjm3eGKHKDgrstw3lEtmPOoJiX71Y=)**
[Make a Monthly Donation](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63240110/406077219/1971507452?recurring=true&refcode=20230509_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxOTFlYWQzLTllZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP17_-SsxNVYu7Vjm3eGKHKDgrstw3lEtmPOoJiX71Y=)
---
**What’s next?**
The fight for fair representation in Alabama is far from over. In November 2021, federal district judges issued a decision to strike down the enacted congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama. This action was a crucial victory for democracy. However, the subsequent decision by the U.S. Supreme Court to consider the case and put the order requiring the immediate redraw of the Alabama congressional map on hold is a cause for concern.

In October 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ (previously known as _Merrill v. Milligan_) and a decision is expected within the next few months. We cannot allow Alabama to perpetuate the disenfranchisement of Black voters. We must fight for a just outcome in this case to set a precedent for fairness for all voters nationwide. Our fair maps movement must remain vigilant and advocate for a new map that includes an additional Black opportunity district, ensuring that all Alabamians have an equal voice in our democracy.
---
**Why is _Allen v. Milligan_ so important for the future of fair maps and voting rights?**
This case is a crucial test of whether the Voting Rights Act, one of the most significant civil rights laws in American history, will continue to be enforced as it has been for decades. The outcome in _Milligan_ will have far-reaching implications not only for the voting power of Black Alabamians but also for voters of color across the country who seek equal representation under Section 2. [**The U.S. Supreme Court decision could damage communities of color in Alabama with fewer voting protections and inadequate voting power, leading to significant vote dilution.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63240113/406077221/1971507452?refcode=20230509_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxOTFlYWQzLTllZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP17_-SsxNVYu7Vjm3eGKHKDgrstw3lEtmPOoJiX71Y=)
Congress has repeatedly reauthorized the VRA with bipartisan support for more than half a century, and the questions presented in this case have already been answered by existing precedent. The current Alabama congressional map is a clear violation of Section 2 of the VRA, and the outcome of this case will determine whether voters of color in Alabama and beyond will have an equal opportunity to participate in the political process and be represented fairly.
That's why All On The Line's fight for fair maps is ongoing daily, year after year. We must continue to advocate for equal representation and justice as we prepare for the decision in _Allen v. Milligan_.
**[To protect fairness for Black Alabamians and voters of color across the country, we must take action now to help All On The Line advocate for fair maps. Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in Alabama are supported by a grassroots-driven movement to restore our democracy. Can you help our efforts across the nation by rushing a donation of $7 today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63240114/406077225/1971507452?refcode=20230509_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxOTFlYWQzLTllZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP17_-SsxNVYu7Vjm3eGKHKDgrstw3lEtmPOoJiX71Y=)**

As a result, Black Alabamians now make up more than 27 percent of the state's population and nearly 26 percent of the state's voting-age population. However, despite the growth in the Black population and the potential for two congressional districts where Black voters would have the opportunity to elect their candidate of choice (sometimes referred to as an “opportunity district”), the Republican-led Alabama legislature enacted a least-change congressional map, ignoring the census data. The current Alabama congressional map only has one Black opportunity district, despite the potential for two, which has raised concerns about minority vote dilution and the disenfranchisement of Black voters in the state. Outside of District 7, the Black community outside of District 7 is cracked among districts 1, 2, and 3 -- even though the Black population in the area is large enough to form a majority of the voting-age population in a second congressional district. = Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation for communities throughout the country. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. = = What’s next? The fight for fair representation in Alabama is far from over. In November 2021, federal district judges issued a decision to strike down the enacted congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama. This action was a crucial victory for democracy. However, the subsequent decision by the U.S. Supreme Court to consider the case and put the order requiring the immediate redraw of the Alabama congressional map on hold is a cause for concern. In October 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Allen v. Milligan (previously known as Merrill v. Milligan) and a decision is expected within the next few months. We cannot allow Alabama to perpetuate the disenfranchisement of Black voters. We must fight for a just outcome in this case to set a precedent for fairness for all voters nationwide. Our fair maps movement must remain vigilant and advocate for a new map that includes an additional Black opportunity district, ensuring that all Alabamians have an equal voice in our democracy. Why is Allen v. Milligan so important for the future of fair maps and voting rights? This case is a crucial test of whether the Voting Rights Act, one of the most significant civil rights laws in American history, will continue to be enforced as it has been for decades. The outcome in Milligan will have far-reaching implications not only for the voting power of Black Alabamians but also for voters of color across the country who seek equal representation under Section 2. = Congress has repeatedly reauthorized the VRA with bipartisan support for more than half a century, and the questions presented in this case have already been answered by existing precedent. The current Alabama congressional map is a clear violation of Section 2 of the VRA, and the outcome of this case will determine whether voters of color in Alabama and beyond will have an equal opportunity to participate in the political process and be represented fairly. That's why All On The Line's fight for fair maps is ongoing daily, year after year. We must continue to advocate for equal representation and justice as we prepare for the decision in Allen v. Milligan. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

Since being elected, she has introduced legislation to cancel student debt, achieve housing for all, and take on the fossil fuel industry. She has fought relentlessly for policies that will benefit all of us – not just the wealthy few.

clean_body: I reached out yesterday because we needed 14 folks to chip in to help get our fundraising on track | | | = Hello, I reached out yesterday because we needed 14 folks to chip in $3 or so to help get our fundraising on track. In the last few weeks of our 2022 campaign, polls got really tight, and pundits doubted whether we’d win. Taking on the debt was the right thing to do, but we’re still paying down the bills we owe. The bad news is, fundraising has really slowed down. THAT is why I was hoping you’d be on the list of donors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I certainly don’t expect folks to donate all the time – that’s not sustainable for anyone. But if you’re able to spare a few extra dollars, we’d feel a lot better about where our campaign cashflow stands at the end of the month. I so appreciate it. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | FIRST: Ted Cruz barely won re-election in 2018, and more voters disapproved of him than approved of him. THEN: When Texas was grappling with a historic weather crisis in 2021 that left millions without power, Ted Cruz FLED the country to Mexico to vacation on a resort beach. NOW: We have a real chance to beat TED CRUZ and elect Black Congressman COLIN ALLRED to US Senate in Texas | | Peter — Ted Cruz has been an embarrassment to the state of Texas for too long. He’s stoked extremism and even tried to overturn the 2020 election. But there’s a better path. Rep. Colin Allred has officially announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate — and he’s just the guy to beat MAGA crony Ted Cruz. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. | Deadline extended! **[Click here in the next 24 hours to help Team Sharice hit our goal→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241074/406081048/-951952754?amount=20&contactdata=GKmINV72c8LwENXquECkK6FbEvaz1pCVsE4kFlT9tRiGEA0i4ZOn09auO98WZ8b7kjHa37mmJwrBNEvdTNy5GZyn1TBQ57bos4d8/tWOfmROaSM00BmWcQYq9sPb2+hhVcZkFaCDKFdUZuVHiLibsg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230513_FR_mmfr.1.5_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk3ZDE1Yi1hMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSHDctdpSjzlV75XyzO7azoDIMSnJRNV9RV5lOuaJlc=)**

* * *
**_Original Message From Sharice From Earlier This Week:_**

The contrast between the work my colleagues and I are doing and the actions of the House Republicans is stark.

While we work to deliver manufacturing jobs, streamline supply chains to lower costs, improve the lives of farm workers, and more, they’re willing to push our economy to the brink of disaster in order to push through an all-out attack on early childhood education, veterans care, the environment, and health care affordability.

**Folks in Kansas and nationwide have made it clear that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for _the people_ , not work to increase their own political power or get on TV.**

I need you with me to ensure we don’t end up in this position again, and a 2024 victory in key races like mine is the only way to do that. **[Will you help my team raise the $5,000 we need this week to ramp up our field organizing? Chip in $20 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241075/406081049/-951952754?amount=20&contactdata=GKmINV72c8LwENXquECkK6FbEvaz1pCVsE4kFlT9tRiGEA0i4ZOn09auO98WZ8b7kjHa37mmJwrBNEvdTNy5GZyn1TBQ57bos4d8/tWOfmROaSM00BmWcQYq9sPb2+hhVcZkFaCDKFdUZuVHiLibsg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230513_FR_mmfr.1.5_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk3ZDE1Yi1hMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSHDctdpSjzlV75XyzO7azoDIMSnJRNV9RV5lOuaJlc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Folks in Kansas and nationwide have made it clear that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for the people , not work to increase their own political power or get on TV. Fellow conservative,

Since Biden took office, the open border policies that he and Sherrod Brown have been pushing have led to millions of illegals streaming into our country unabated.

With them comes drugs like fentanyl, violent criminals, human traffickers, and potentially even terrorists and foreign agents who are now embedded in our country.

_**We’re being invaded, Fellow conservative.**_

No civilized and sane nation should allow this type of invasion, and with the elimination of Title 42 by the Biden Administration, **that invasion is only going to get worse.**

Biden’s solution is to send 1,500 members of the military to the border to help with “administrative” tasks, but he knows full well that it won’t solve the crisis at the border.

**It’s time to hold Biden and Senate Democrats like Sherrod Brown accountable for allowing this invasion.**

I’m running to defeat Brown in Ohio’s toss-up, top-target Senate seat, and I need your support to flip this seat and give Republicans a majority in the Senate that can fix this crisis.

We must extend Title 42, send our military to secure the border, finish building the wall President Trump started, remove incentives for illegals, end sanctuary cities, and crack down on employers hiring illegals.

But Biden, Brown and Democrats in Congress have already demonstrated they won’t do any of those things. **They’ve chosen to let us be invaded instead.**

We can only fix this crisis and secure our nation by eliminating Democrats’ majorities and restoring conservative leadership.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: It’s time to hold Biden and Senate Democrats like Sherrod Brown accountable for allowing this invasion. | | Fellow conservative, Since Biden took office, the open border policies that he and Sherrod Brown have been pushing have led to millions of illegals streaming into our country unabated. With them comes drugs like fentanyl, violent criminals, human traffickers, and potentially even terrorists and foreign agents who are now embedded in our country. We’re being invaded, Fellow conservative. No civilized and sane nation should allow this type of invasion, and with the elimination of Title 42 by the Biden Administration, that invasion is only going to get worse. Biden’s solution is to send 1,500 members of the military to the border to help with “administrative” tasks, but he knows full well that it won’t solve the crisis at the border. It’s time to hold Biden and Senate Democrats like Sherrod Brown accountable for allowing this invasion. I’m running to defeat Brown in Ohio’s toss-up, top-target Senate seat, and I need your support to flip this seat and give Republicans a majority in the Senate that can fix this crisis. We must extend Title 42, send our military to secure the border, finish building the wall President Trump started, remove incentives for illegals, end sanctuary cities, and crack down on employers hiring illegals. But Biden, Brown and Democrats in Congress have already demonstrated they won’t do any of those things. They’ve chosen to let us be invaded instead. We can only fix this crisis and secure our nation by eliminating Democrats’ majorities and restoring conservative leadership. Thanks, Bernie Moreno Republican for U.S. Senate Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241361/406082251/2012950163?refcode=EM_FR_230513CA_N_CA_NO_9_G_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzU0ZjFlOC1hMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7iYF6YdVixpnce4EoJUWpDgYlRr_6R_WUKR-Rhj5HQ=)

– Team Emilia

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos is facing 13 criminal charges *and* a Democratic challenger. It’s time for him to face the consequences of his lies.
body:
Challenger for George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fc534ca-095a-4a4e-b719-daa47eca3142/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Hallelujah! The Justice Department, as you probably know by now, filed 13 criminal charges vs George Santos.** **_Santos was charged with money laundering, wire fraud, theft of public funds & more. _**[_Luckily we have a great candidate ready to take out Santos in this Democratic leaning seat. State Senator Anna Kaplan, who's as real deal as real deal gets._](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb70eaa2-3566-48a2-898f-bb32ae7b8002/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From her email announcement:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc628dc6-33dc-4e37-8c8f-12017315037f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Kaplan is a compassionate, talented star. **_**_Santos? He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust, mom survived 9/11, worked at Goldman Sachs, ran a foundation that saved thousands of dogs and cats. ALL. LIES._** _Santos is a Pro-Trump, anti-choice lunatic who is such a ghoul, he isn't only pro-assault rifle, but as children were being massacred by them, wore an assault rifle pin to Congress. Sickening. __Kaplan, on the other hand, will take on Trump and others who attack our democracy, anti-choice fanatics, and AR-15 fetishists._ [**_Join us in electing Anna Kaplan and removing this disgrace--and per the Justice Department, criminal--George Santos, by giving Kaplan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to elect her and win back a Democratic House Majority._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd83d3fa-bc08-469f-a10c-04ab385e0917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This race is as clear and crucial as it gets. Thank you for fighting for what's right._ Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bdefaa0-a4ed-4ae9-a642-3f6aa03aca1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I just vetoed the GOP’s abortion ban.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Now, I need your help.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241862/406084524/823540626?refcode=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWFkMzQxZC1hM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JphFpgBFK84tD924B4exDzk5N_ckZIsCgA8iORB6T1o=&emci=1527e0fd-33f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — Moments ago, I _vetoed_ the GOP’s extremist abortion ban. As your governor, I have always sworn to do everything I can to defend reproductive rights. I am proud to once again uphold that promise today. Peter, this legislation is wrong for our state, dangerous for women, and a direct assault on our most personal freedoms. It must not be allowed to stand. **But right-wing attacks on our freedoms won’t end with my veto.** Despite the will of the majority of North Carolinians, the GOP plans to hold override votes and to take any other action necessary to end abortion access in our state. **Securing reproductive rights for North Carolinians will come down to future elections. I’m already hard at work supporting pro-choice candidates — Democrats who we can depend on to fight for us.** **[I’m depending on YOU to help me. I need you to make your first contribution to support my efforts. Click here to donate $25 or any amount you can, right away>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241863/406084525/435245919?refcode=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWFkMzQxZC1hM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JphFpgBFK84tD924B4exDzk5N_ckZIsCgA8iORB6T1o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63241864/406084526/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2ead341d-a3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWFkMzQxZC1hM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JphFpgBFK84tD924B4exDzk5N_ckZIsCgA8iORB6T1o=)

clean_body: Now, I need your help. | Peter — Moments ago, I vetoed the GOP’s extremist abortion ban. As your governor, I have always sworn to do everything I can to defend reproductive rights. I am proud to once again uphold that promise today. Peter, this legislation is wrong for our state, dangerous for women, and a direct assault on our most personal freedoms. It must not be allowed to stand. But right-wing attacks on our freedoms won’t end with my veto. Despite the will of the majority of North Carolinians, the GOP plans to hold override votes and to take any other action necessary to end abortion access in our state. Securing reproductive rights for North Carolinians will come down to future elections. I’m already hard at work supporting pro-choice candidates — Democrats who we can depend on to fight for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = We won’t stop fighting, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. Our rights are on the line and NOW is the time to put in the work we need to win.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63242035/406085376/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230513DelCoSE2_N_TEAM_90do_6_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YmZmOTE0LWE0ZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XFK5pyvlztBMKiMwkgqBcLtWLUy4rv0w84EEEqZKeuM=)
| Fellow activist,

We have worked hard to implement a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of all Pennsylvanians.

Winning the PA House in November and again this February got us halfway there, but it’s all at stake **again** with Tuesday’s Primary Election as there is a special election happening in Delaware County. **[Our team is hard at work getting out the vote for this Special Election AND the Municipal, Local, and Judicial Primary. Can you pitch in a $10 donation right away to help support our final push of getting out the vote?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63242037/406085378/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230513DelCoSE2_N_TEAM_90do_6_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YmZmOTE0LWE0ZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XFK5pyvlztBMKiMwkgqBcLtWLUy4rv0w84EEEqZKeuM=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63242039/406085380/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230513DelCoSE2_N_TEAM_90do_6_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YmZmOTE0LWE0ZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XFK5pyvlztBMKiMwkgqBcLtWLUy4rv0w84EEEqZKeuM=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63242042/406085383/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230513DelCoSE2_N_TEAM_90do_6_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YmZmOTE0LWE0ZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XFK5pyvlztBMKiMwkgqBcLtWLUy4rv0w84EEEqZKeuM=) Currently, Democrats hold the majority in the State House by just _one_ seat. If Republicans are able to flip that seat in Delaware County, the PA GOP will once again hold the majority they need to attack our rights.

**One seat** can make all the difference between a completely Republican-run legislature or a legislature that will continue to fight for Pennsylvanians’ rights to equality, freedom to vote, bodily autonomy, and much more. **[Fellow activist, our fundamental rights are on the line, and we are putting in the work to ensure our centered communities know it. We did it in Allegheny County earlier this year, and with your support, we know we can do it now in Delaware County. Will you donate $10 right now to help us continue expanding our voter outreach during our last three days until Election Day?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63242043/406085384/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230513DelCoSE2_N_TEAM_90do_6_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YmZmOTE0LWE0ZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XFK5pyvlztBMKiMwkgqBcLtWLUy4rv0w84EEEqZKeuM=)** clean_body: Our rights are on the line and NOW is the time to put in the work we need to win. = | Fellow activist, We have worked hard to implement a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of all Pennsylvanians. Winning the PA House in November and again this February got us halfway there, but it’s all at stake again with Tuesday’s Primary Election as there is a special election happening in Delaware County. = = = Currently, Democrats hold the majority in the State House by just one seat. If Republicans are able to flip that seat in Delaware County, the PA GOP will once again hold the majority they need to attack our rights. One seat can make all the difference between a completely Republican-run legislature or a legislature that will continue to fight for Pennsylvanians’ rights to equality, freedom to vote, bodily autonomy, and much more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: These races are unbelievably expensive.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The general election is approaching, and we need to be prepared. Peter — the next phase of this election is about to start, and Andy is counting on his grassroots team of supporters to ensure he has the resources to compete with whichever opponent wins on Tuesday. [**If you're ready to help Andy secure a re-election victory and continue making progress for Kentuckians, chip in now to help him be prepared to kick off the general election »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242140/406085856/96677371?refcode=em23_230513_prmry2_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230513_prmry2_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=255f0e69-a4f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTVmMGU2OS1hNGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B09FIVYcFQhqae0YP9tGMF6esAJJeJrBqhgSgaWR6jM=)

**To recap:** One of Andy's opponents, Kelly Craft, has **loaned herself $10 MILLION.** And her husband spent $1.5 million on a PAC that supports her. She knows this will be one of the most expensive races this year, and she has the resources to spend whatever it takes to defeat Andy.

It's not just Craft's nearly unlimited resources that are making this the most expensive gubernatorial race this cycle – outside spending groups have already poured millions of dollars into Kentucky. Ads have filled the airwaves, inundating Kentuckians with political jabs, cheap shots, and attempts to attack Andy. **The spending and attacks against Andy will only ramp up after an opponent for November is named.**

Our team is focused on protecting the progress Andy's made for the Commonwealth: creating record numbers of good-paying jobs, attracting billions in economic investment, expanding access to health care, securing infrastructure funding, and supporting Kentucky families across every zip code.

But to keep up the momentum, Andy needs your support. Once his opponent is revealed, there will be a coordinated front coming after Andy, and they've proven to have the deep pockets to make it a long, expensive race. **Here’s what I saw when I pulled our fundraising report today: **

Dedicated supporters like you are the reason we can help strong Democratic women overcome obstacles on the campaign trail and in office. These women are fighting to**** defend access to lifesaving health care, lower costs for working families, and turn our country around. We need to have their backs while they fight to take care of our communities**.

But any fundraising shortfall has big consequences in our work to transform politics. ****So please, Peter: **

Peter, Most political candidates only care about their big-shot, rich donors and forget about the grassroots supporters giving $5 or $25 at a time who make campaigns like ours possible.

But that's not how we roll.

I believe in the power of the people and want to show my appreciation for your support.

So, here's the deal: We’re about 72 hours away from a major mid-month deadline and could really use your help. **After this deadline, my team is putting together a list of grassroots donors for me to call and thank.**

[**Is there any chance you could spare us a few bucks before Tuesday at midnight? You could end up on my call list, and every dollar brings us closer to our $10,000 goal >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242564/406088006/-1470085607?refcode=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBmNzUzMzMtYTdmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZtgtsH88o_i-z71PqY5moRJZZFNFCMrw7W5ipUzqM_s=)

This election is about restoring power to the people and challenging the special interests that influence our leaders. But it won’t be easy.

We’re not just up against Reeves — we’re up against his rich and powerful buddies too. And trust me, there’s an army of them out there.

**That's why your support is so important. Tate and his buddies just released a massive fundraising haul. If we’re going to stay competitive, then we need to meet mid-month goals just like this one.**

So what do you say? [**Can I count on your support before our make-or-break deadline? You might just get a call from yours truly to say thank you for your support!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242565/406088007/-1470085607?refcode=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBmNzUzMzMtYTdmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZtgtsH88o_i-z71PqY5moRJZZFNFCMrw7W5ipUzqM_s=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242566/406088008/-1470085607?amount=5&refcode=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBmNzUzMzMtYTdmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZtgtsH88o_i-z71PqY5moRJZZFNFCMrw7W5ipUzqM_s=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242567/406088009/-1470085607?amount=10&refcode=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBmNzUzMzMtYTdmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZtgtsH88o_i-z71PqY5moRJZZFNFCMrw7W5ipUzqM_s=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63242568/406088010/-1470085607?amount=25&refcode=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0f75333-a7f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBmNzUzMzMtYTdmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZtgtsH88o_i-z71PqY5moRJZZFNFCMrw7W5ipUzqM_s=)**

clean_body: I am not kidding. | = Peter, Most political candidates only care about their big-shot, rich donors and forget about the grassroots supporters giving $5 or $25 at a time who make campaigns like ours possible. But that's not how we roll. I believe in the power of the people and want to show my appreciation for your support. So, here's the deal: We’re about 72 hours away from a major mid-month deadline and could really use your help. After this deadline, my team is putting together a list of grassroots donors for me to call and thank. = This election is about restoring power to the people and challenging the special interests that influence our leaders. But it won’t be easy. We’re not just up against Reeves — we’re up against his rich and powerful buddies too. And trust me, there’s an army of them out there. That's why your support is so important. Tate and his buddies just released a massive fundraising haul. If we’re going to stay competitive, then we need to meet mid-month goals just like this one. One of VHA Innovators Network's (iNET) signature programs is the Greenhouse Initiative, an opportunity for the health care innovation community to collaborate with iNET sites across the nation at the earliest stages of innovation. This allows them to receive input from Veterans and employees to impact solutions aimed to improve Veteran care.

Peter, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1882e74ddae9409b863e840196cadbce&_e=aIcT2OoyOu_A1gMDM5YiiokMaHp4UBOg1bDBIOD6rQ11K02MY6PBk4INsZMuAO506zsK26t9JXZi9fbdGs5HNylTMrtazwJ-QhbxxZWS3cRrbV6bhLjwa0Bu9d4UjPOEka8RoSOcKIbBJzC8cCZgms22lu484qi8_V78PS_jewKBYBW8mrK--R7ZFhNiZdiuo_V79oDDO-Yjmblbxr4ij5lYbnxW5MjhpuTJkbYAyTBEnB5CXzFwvAMFUQfAwLRW0ZzPRybygooMzqsSXAWU_2r27cFtQI5NXmMTGKBNAlFruVm-UdVflTtsDsJxoBKXnyNEx8i7nonaA1bA7cej9Yhyv_ph7sSt09lMiKOe9xekpyE5AHWNleFCS8qy3nmWHb0muHd2-1a3so0UTCAHww%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1882e74ddae9409b863e840196cadbce&_e=aIcT2OoyOu_A1gMDM5YiiokMaHp4UBOg1bDBIOD6rQ11K02MY6PBk4INsZMuAO506zsK26t9JXZi9fbdGs5HNylTMrtazwJ-QhbxxZWS3cRrbV6bhLjwa0Bu9d4UjPOEka8RoSOcKIbBJzC8cCZgms22lu484qi8_V78PS_jewKBYBW8mrK--R7ZFhNiZdiuo_V79oDDO-Yjmblbxr4ij5lYbnxW5MjhpuTJkbYAyTBEnB5CXzFwvAMFUQfAwLRW5TZIfarAo6cQ-vorRgTHMoheAoZlVjq-NpmQjes5ny_GchQVwFfLTqImJ41QFEbiax-roV188-NTildM1Cdr1qCVP2FvRoijQiv0UkD6i_2k7a_sxn3wWEaoVfnIuMCXW421ueKIyQmDs6Z9e_YmyQ%3D%3D)

Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1882e74ddae9409b863e840196cadbce&_e=aIcT2OoyOu_A1gMDM5YiiokMaHp4UBOg1bDBIOD6rQ11K02MY6PBk4INsZMuAO506zsK26t9JXZi9fbdGs5HNylTMrtazwJ-QhbxxZWS3cRrbV6bhLjwa0Bu9d4UjPOEka8RoSOcKIbBJzC8cCZgms22lu484qi8_V78PS_jewKBYBW8mrK--R7ZFhNiZdiuo_V79oDDO-Yjmblbxr4ij5lYbnxW5MjhpuTJkbYAyTBEnB5CXzFwvAMFUQfAwLRWocQR1swSIEZ11iJP8vLRWvJHUkOBWDybLYot54YH3RYCoUD3BvdO4i5lEx55BwterTurV2wBiRmOY56dppzYkxaDKMrByMgUmELQfRhHv2hAVHDjBrNds7lWxzn2btrPDTVewvniDbXYnH9EllSuYQ%3D%3D)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.

| Peter,

I hate to bother you on the weekend, but Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day if I’m going to defend my toss-up seat in Congress.

This was the most expensive House race in Pennsylvania in 2022, and you can bet Republicans are preparing to spend even more this time around in their efforts to defeat me – especially because they know flipping this seat red is their only chance to hold on to their razor-thin House majority and continue pushing their extremist agenda.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244101/406094059/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVjNjBkZmMtYTlmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FHHUM0mts-rRkit24x9U7ZLOneOZ8rHYXu9IXbP8Bs=) Friend,

**There have been more mass shootings than days in 2023 so far.** That's an alarming statistic, and it should concern every single lawmaker in the country -- regardless of their party affiliation.

Unfortunately, the U.S. House has been hijacked by MAGA-extremists who have been bought and paid for by the NRA and gun manufacturers.

We need to get serious about addressing the gun violence epidemic, and a big piece of the equation is reinstating a federal assault weapons ban. **[If you agree, add your name to my petition demanding Congress act on a federal ban on assault weapons.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244102/406094060/1172464152?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVjNjBkZmMtYTlmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FHHUM0mts-rRkit24x9U7ZLOneOZ8rHYXu9IXbP8Bs=&emci=0d8ca81d-99f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=eec60dfc-a9f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

---

It's a surprising notion these days, but there was a time when this country actually had a _bipartisan consensus_ about an assault weapons ban. The 1994 federal ban decreased gun massacres by 37%. When the ban expired in 2006, gun massacres rose by 183%.

Ever since, the NRA and gun lobby have pushed for a radical reinterpretation of the Second Amendment, and any conversation about ending gun violence is met with absurd accusations of overreach and government tyranny.

**If elected to Congress, I'll challenge NRA-backed members of Congress who refuse to take action. That includes unapologetically supporting legislation to reinstate the assault weapons ban.**

**[I need to know you're with me. Join me and back this life-saving legislation by adding your name here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244104/406094062/1172464152?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVjNjBkZmMtYTlmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FHHUM0mts-rRkit24x9U7ZLOneOZ8rHYXu9IXbP8Bs=&emci=0d8ca81d-99f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=eec60dfc-a9f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the ripple effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=57%2E52803%2EfTCU0J)

| | Our most important actions aren’t usually the big, grand gestures. They’re just pebbles in the pond, causing a positive ripple effect for our communities. As a young girl who wanted to get into public service, that was a lesson I learned pretty quickly and still carry with me. It’s easy to get frustrated and disillusioned when even the smallest changes are slow going and it seems like there’s always another obstacle in the path of progress. But with a little patience and persistence, amazing things can – and do – happen. That’s how progress starts. Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to bring the crucial lessons I’ve learned in my 26 years in public service to Washington, and deliver practical, positive change for Marylanders. **When you make an early contribution to our grassroots campaign, you’re throwing your own pebble into the pond.[Just $5, $15, or $25 helps us hire talented staff, build our campaign infrastructure, and connect with voters across the state. Your investment will have an immeasurable impact on this race in the months ahead. Can I count on you to pitch in today?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/875?t=9&amount=5&akid=57%2E52803%2EfTCU0J)** | | | [Chip in $5](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/875?t=10&amount=5&akid=57%2E52803%2EfTCU0J)

I’m committed to continuing my record of thoughtful service and smart solutions in Washington, and I’m really glad to have you by my side.
Thank you,
Angela Alsobrooks
