name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can you help us keep momentum?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek, there’s no question about it: our campaign has
generated so much early momentum thanks to your support these last few
months.

With the help of nearly 130,000 grassroots supporters, we’ve raised
millions of dollars since this campaign launched. Our grassroots movement
is incredible, and I’m so grateful and consistently blown away by this
team’s unprecedented support.

It’s been humbling and reassuring to myself and my team to know that we
can continue to rely on grassroots supporters like you to ensure we keep
momentum high during the times when we need it most — important times like
this very moment as we head into our mid-quarter fundraising push.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]So before I go any further, can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you
can right now to help us kickstart our mid-quarter push?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=may2023_abs_em.VrKnFM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Odds are you’ve heard my team and I discuss the importance of the
public-facing FEC report we submit every three months. We talk about it so
much because it really is that important.

The GOP dissects our campaign finance reports. They’ll look for any signs
of weakness or opportunities to pounce on me and the strength of this
team.

We have to continue proving the strength of our campaign day in and day
out. If we want to keep on track and show Kevin McCarthy, Mitch McConnell,
and the rest of their GOP cronies that we’re taking this fight for our
democracy to the Senate, we need to hit our mid-quarter fundraising goal.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]What do you say,
Derek? With less than 3 days to
go, can you make a contribution of any size right now to help us stay on
track to hit our important mid-quarter fundraising goal?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2220%2E5257348%2Ea1FhVT ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

Thanks again for your support, and I hope you have a fantastic weekend!

— Adam

body:
Donald Trump is not your neighborhood Republican, as his town hall just reminded everyone.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244293/406094863/1595047754?refcode=EM_FR_230513TrumpTownhall_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlNzE3MTctYWJmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7GswtWh7eWQOgyyUOvnLiseynPxnAc4OF1LhZboRv1w=)
Fellow Democrats, Donald Trump’s CNN Town Hall appearance went exactly as expected.

**Here are 3 top takeaways to remind us of what is at stake when he runs for President in 2024.**

Trump:
1. **Called January 6 “a beautiful day”** and doubled down on his plan to **pardon** most January 6 Capitol rioters who were convicted for their crimes.
2. Declared that “Getting rid of _Roe v. Wade_ was **an incredible thing** ,” bragged about his part in making it happen, and refused to admit whether he would support or oppose a nationwide abortion ban.
3. Encouraged Republicans in the House to **wreck the American economy and set off a worldwide economic crisis** if Democrats do not capitulate to the GOP’s hostage-taking demands for extreme budget cuts.

**[This email could be ten pages long, but need we say more? Donate $10 now to help us stop Trump in 2024 and protect our democracy, our rights, and our economy. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244294/406094864/1595047754?refcode=EM_FR_230513TrumpTownhall_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlNzE3MTctYWJmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7GswtWh7eWQOgyyUOvnLiseynPxnAc4OF1LhZboRv1w=)**

subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWnoKEcDNq

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWnoKEcDNq

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61797142:WnoKEcDNq:m:3:2532013465:E0AC2E412C4056726925C0A2A8FFE8B5:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help reach my ambitious daily goal of $150,000?[Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63244550/406095716/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230513_FR_1.5_0_6MO_surrogate_NA_NA_allred.split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTdiYjYzYy1hY2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--IFyS3wxHEZfl3ZXYf8_x1f161lizFu50IGOm3M_WY=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

name: Add Your Name via Left Action
subject: CNN considering ANOTHER Trump town hall? Tell them NO!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [**Sign the Petition: Tell CNN "DO NOT have another Trump town hall!" >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a4fdf49-e574-494e-b1b6-8ef1c4899695/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8837928-c914-4a99-b043-43b809bb1381/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | CNN held a "town hall" event with Trump, with an audience packed with Trump supporters, and it went about as [horrifically](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b880faf-4ec3-481b-a87f-b9ac42f4f3ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as everyone with a brain predicted. Trump lied over and over again, and when the moderator tried to challenge him, the Trump audience simply drowned her out with yelling and guffaws.

[**And crazily enough, CNN is actually considering doing it again.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29faae9b-0e47-4e37-8307-00d44218e19b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Are you kidding me? Trump isn't just any old candidate, he's a traitorous criminal who tried to overthrown our democracy. CNN may have no choice but to cover him as part of the news, but giving him free national airtime in front of millions is another thing altogether. And CNN should NOT do it again.

[**Tell CNN: "DO NOT hold any more Trump town halls"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4264abe4-f419-4bc0-a3df-ffbcfde2906c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

Here’s how you can help elect Republicans this fall.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3ca9f936fe154a9e/fc1fa23685e1fd2bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Last week, Hoosiers like you nominated a strong slate of candidates to represent our party in cities and towns across the state. Now, it’s time to get to work to help get them elected later this fall! **Here are three quick things you can do that will help do just that:**
1. **Reach out to your local Republican candidates and see how you can get involved.** Maybe that’s knocking on doors or maybe that’s following them on social media and helping to spread the word!_It all helps._
2. **Make sure your friends and family are registered to vote.** Send them to [this link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3ca9f936fe154a9e/ed6f52717c0e5238c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to check.
3. [**Chip in a generous donation to help your Indiana Republican Party gear up for the general election campaign.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3ca9f936fe154a9e/67c44f6c5fbb4358c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Just like we did in 2019, we’re gearing up for a huge general election campaign operation to help our nominees across the state cross the finish line first.

With your support, we can ensure our local communities continue to thrive thanks to responsible Republican leadership. Thanks in advance for your support at this critical moment! — Indiana Republican Party

name: Jon Tester
subject: Did you know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Peter,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.

Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**

When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.

**[So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. clean_body: | Peter, Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18954?t=1001&akid=3230%2E346206%2ES62PlJ ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230513-3230-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3230_346206_S62PlJ&akid=3230%2E346206%2ES62PlJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3230%2E346206%2ES62PlJ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Peter,

Yesterday, Kurt told you about our team’s $3,000 fundraising goal to get back on track ahead of our first FEC fundraising deadline. Now, with Roll Call calling our district a _**"key race,"**_ it’s even more important for us to meet this goal.

AZ-01 is shaping up to be one of the most competitive districts in the entire country, but defeating David Schweikert won’t be easy. Schweikert has extremists and corporate PACs backing him, but Kurt refuses to accept any money from corporate PACs. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! End Medical Debt and Fight for Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie to Reintroduce M4A | Freedom from Medical Debt Launch
| Ro Khanna Joins Patient Advocates | NCLC Policy Breakdown | New Med Debt
Action Team | Share Your Story! | Medical Debt & M4A Stickers | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8650?t=1011&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]
On Wednesday, we’ll join Bernie Sanders, Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Debbie
Dingell, and healthcare justice leaders to reintroduce Medicare for All!

If you’re near DC, come out and show your support for universal,
single-payer health care in America. This is a chance to show the strength
of our movement and the power of our demand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8650?t=1012&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]JOIN US IN DC
★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8651?t=1013&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

Become a cosponsor to End Medical Debt and advance the fight for Medicare
for All! Help fund our work as we organize people across the country to
take on price-gouging hospitals, predatory debt collectors, and more!

Pitch in $10 or sign up with a recurring donation of at least $5 and get
these new stickers with our gratitude!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8651?t=1014&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1015&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1016&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

As we join Bernie and Pramila in the fight for Medicare for All, we also
just kicked off our new campaign to End Medical Debt on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1017&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]LIVE Town
Hall Monday with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our brave members who spoke out to
share their stories.

“Progressives are beginning a new offensive on Capitol Hill: Taking on
America’s staggering medical debt,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8653?t=1018&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]The Independent wrote of our
campaign launch. “Headed up by Our Revolution, advocates around the
country are gathering horror stories where lifesaving treatment often
becomes a financial death sentence.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8654?t=1019&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

Our patient activists (read some of their stories below) have been meeting
with Ro Khanna and Bernie’s team as they get ready to introduce the
Freedom from Medical Debt Initiative — and our organizers have big plans
around the country.

“It’s time to wipe the slate clean and cancel all medical debt,” Ro said.
“This would pressure Congress and the White House to protect patients from
the horrendous price-gouging and predatory debt-collecting tactics that
bankrupt hard-working Americans every day.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1020&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]WATCH OUR FREEDOM FROM MEDICAL DEBT TOWN HALL HERE!

★ ★ ★

“The bill will say, if you have medical debt, it’s erased to zero,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8655?t=1021&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Ro
told us Monday. “Hospitals need to wipe it out, they’re making way too
much profit off of it. It’s affordable and it’s the first step to Medicare
for All.”

As OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8656?t=1022&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]explained at the town
hall, we also have the leverage of federal funding, which makes up the
majority of hospital revenue, that can be used to stop the pipeline of new
debt.

“Hospitals are federal contractors who receive hundreds of billions of
taxpayer dollars through Medicare and Medicaid,” Joseph said. “That means
we the people have the power to withhold federal funding from hospitals
that hurt patients.”

“The president could sign an executive order that if you get federal
funding, you can’t engage in price gouging, you can’t engage in predatory
collections from individuals or we’re going to stop the hospital from
getting federal funding,” Ro told us Monday.

“We can stop the most egregious practices with the leverage that we have
with federal funds. That’s why we’ve got to push the president to do it,”
he said [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8657?t=1023&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]in this clip.

“You know, as it turns out with a lot of things, good policy that helps
people turns out to be good politics,” Ro said. “If you do things that
help people's lives, people tend to think that’s good politics.”

"Medical debt is the number one reason for personal bankruptcies in the
United States," Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8658?t=1024&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]The Hill. "We can stop that and the president has the power.”

Covid-era Medicaid is drying up for millions, meaning more people will be
pushed into debt, and as Biden gears up for re-election, taking action on
medical debt would be a step toward earning trust and higher approval
ratings. But, mostly, the President should do it because it’s the right
thing.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1025&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be
mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel
medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop
predatory collection tactics.

Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an
invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare
for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1026&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1027&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

People are hurting and we know the root causes. An estimated 41% of
Americans are saddled with nearly $200 billion in medical debt. It forces
people to cut back on food and shelter, put off needed care, and put their
lives on credit cards (as you’ll read below).

Berneta Haynes of the National Consumer Law Center [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8659?t=1028&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]talked at our Town
Hall about factors of race, wealth, insurance status, and chronic
conditions, but she also exposed the role of hospitals in America’s
mounting medical debt crisis.

Despite the ACA, hospitals are getting away with price-gouging patients,
failing to inform them about their right to free care and aid, then
resorting to predatory collections practices like placing liens on homes
and wage garnishments.

“Charity care accounts for about 1-4% of expenses at private, tax-exempt,
nonprofit hospitals. We see top hospitals hounding patients for $1800
while raking in billions and sending people into a debt spiral,” Berneta
said. “Then they claim that as part of their charity care - after ruining
people’s credit, maybe their ability to get housing or a job.”

★ ★ ★
OUR REVOLUTION PATIENT ACTIVISTS

“Elizabeth McLaughlin shared her account on the town hall of how treatment
in 2017 put her tens of thousands in debt as she put utility bills and
groceries on credit rather than face medical debt collectors,” wrote
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8653?t=1029&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Independent.

“I got injured, then got sick. I was afraid they’d stop seeing me, so I
paid the doctors and put my life on credit cards,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8660?t=1030&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Betsy told us. “I
pass the debt from one card to another. In the meantime, I’m just grateful
I’m employed, insured, and can keep making the payments.”

“Every time you go it’s going to cost you more money, so it’s been drilled
into all of us not to go to the doctor like we don’t deserve it,” said
Betsy, who’s 62 and lives in Indiana. “It all comes down to one thing:
healthcare costs too much and we can’t all get it.

Denise Lyons, 70, of Michigan, spoke at our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1031&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Town Hall of her inability
to retire from nursing or get the care she needs for multiple serious
health issues.

“I was diagnosed with diabetes and the second stage of kidney failure,”
she said. “Now, she’s putting off biopsies and canceled her appointments
with the cardiovascular specialist and the dentist because of high
copays.”

“I know putting off care is dangerous, but I can’t afford treatment or to
go into more debt,” Denise told us.

Kristin Noreen, 59, of Washington, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8661?t=1032&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]told us of her harrowing experience
of being hit by a car while riding her bike in 2010, which led to
traumatic brain injury, getting her hand reattached, and barely survived.

“Like anyone, I thought I would be set for life,” she said. “If I’d have
known how it was going to be, I might have given up. I’m glad I didn’t,
but there’s no end in sight for this debt cycle.”

Insurance failed to cover 100 percent of the $1 million total and
subsequent care, so Kristin racked up $60k on credit cards. “I sold my
home, my retirement account is gone, and I declared bankruptcy,” she told
us.

“I’m back up to $10k in debt, and I can’t work as much as I need,” Kristin
said. “My parents took out a home equity loan, my friend paid for some
dental care I needed. it’s a vicious cycle.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1033&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ][IMG]

“Sharing your stories is so important,” Ro Khanna told our members.
“Congress members across the country need to realize that medical debt
affects real people — it’s affecting their constituents and they should
sign on.”

Do you owe money for medical care that you couldn’t afford? Have you put
life expenses on credit cards to pay medical bills? Share your story!

Our goal is to feature voices from every congressional district in
America. Join the hundreds of people already speaking out through our
survey.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1034&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]TELL YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Bernie, AOC, and Our Revolution are all-in for Helen Gym for Philly Mayor!
Our Philly members will join them for a rally for Helen in Philadelphia on
Sunday, hoping to repeat the magic progressives pulled off to elect new
Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson last month.

“Just like we saw in Chicago, this contest in Philadelphia will come down
to big money versus grassroots organizing,” Joseph Geevarghese, executive
director of Our Revolution, told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8662?t=1035&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]The Hill this week.

The Hill noted that Our Revolution is getting to work, putting our
“mobilization muscle of 40,000 members in the city behind Gym.” And now,
Helen is polling in the lead of this crowded race!

“What we know is that progressives’ messaging on issues from public safety
to education to good jobs and housing has resonated with the Democratic
base in key cities, from Chicago to St. Louis,” Joseph said. “We are
confident that this message, championed by Helen Gym, will resonate with
Philadelphians on election day.”

A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our
recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8663?t=1036&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the
blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.”

It’s time to turn out progressive super voters in Philadelphia, where
we’ll be mobilizing our 42k members and making 300k voter contacts in the
city.

“Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the
electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8215?t=1037&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

Also in Philly, Our Revolution is proudly supporting Amanda McIllmurray, a
working-class organizer who would be the first openly queer Council Member
ever in the city!

In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball
umpire when she began organizing for Bernie Sander's presidential campaign
and building local progressive power.

“I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and
universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she
knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a
family-sustaining job.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution backed Rep. Sara Innamorato in her run for PA House in 2018
alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to endorse for
Allegheny County Executive - a key seat in Pittsburgh!

With the progressive movement at her back, she’s now leading the
establishment favorite by double digits in the polls, but we’re taking
nothing for granted.

As State Rep, Sara led dozens of bills for affordable housing, higher
wages, environmental protections, reproductive healthcare, and much more.

As County Exec, she’d have the power to directly affect people’s lives —
from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the
county jail to protecting abortion care.

★ ★ ★

VICTORY! With the support of the progressive movement, community
organizers and San Antonio Council Members Teri Castillo (D-5) and Jalen
McKee-Rodriguez (D-3) won their races for re-election!

Teri and Jalen helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked
with the community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that
passed by one vote on the council.

“We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing,
workers' rights, and more,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8644?t=1038&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Teri told us.

Also in Texas, Our Revolution-backed ballot measure Prop A passed in
Austin, showing voters want to hold police accountable and deter the use
of excessive force.

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENT! Our Revolution is backing Aaron Regunberg for US Congress
in a crowded race to replace outgoing David Cicilline in RI-1.

"I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of Our Revolution, which was
founded by Bernie Sanders and supports progressive leaders with track
records of organizing broad coalitions to make a difference for everyday
people,” Aaron told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8664?t=1039&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]The Boston Globe.

“That’s what I’ve done here in Rhode Island by helping secure passage of
paid sick days, higher wages, harm reduction strategies, and new clean
energy programs — and that's what I'll do in Congress.”

★ ★ ★

We have a chance to elect several great progressives in Virginia on
Election Day June 20th!

For the State Senate, Our Revolution is backing Ben Litchfield (SD-27),
Heidi Drauschak (SD-35), and Elizabeth Guzman; and for the State House,
we’re backing Rozia Henson (HD-19).

★ ★ ★

We have a chance to build out progressive power at the city and state
level where it can directly affect lives. The best way to make an impact
on these races from anywhere in the country is to sign up to make calls
with our team of volunteers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1040&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

On Monday of this week, Our Revolution NYPAN activists were arrested
alongside Susan Sarandon and OFW President Saru Jayaraman at an action
calling for New York to raise the minimum wage and end the subminimum wage
for tipped workers.

Our state bill there has 33 cosponsors and growing because of all of you
and your support, so we look forward to seeing NY step up and do what’s
right.

A reminder, if you want to get involved with our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1041&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Raise the Wage Team
to organize state by state for better pay and an end to subminimum wages
for tipped workers.

★ ★ ★

On Monday, Our Revolution will join another global day of action to Make
Amazon Pay. This time, we’re demanding Amazon pay its writers as we
support striking members of the Writers Guild of America!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8665?t=1042&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]Get involved with our global coalition holding demonstrations and
showing solidarity across the internet with the hashtags #MakeAmazonPay
and #WGAStrike.

This struggle highlights how Amazon’s business extends across the global
economy and threatens working conditions everywhere. It can also teach us
the power we can build when allies stand together along supply chains and
across borders.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Become a co-sponsor for our campaign to End Medical Debt, and Stand with
Bernie and Rep. Jayapal in the fight for Medicare for All. Chip in $10 (or
$5 recurring) and we'll send you these two new stickers with our
gratitude. Members get both stickers with any donation of $5 or more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8648?t=1043&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be
mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel
medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop
predatory collection tactics.

Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an
invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare
for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1044&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT!

★ ★ ★

On Wednesday, we’ll join Bernie Sanders, Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Debbie
Dingell, and healthcare justice leaders to reintroduce Medicare for All!

If you’re near DC, come out and show your support for universal,
single-payer health care in America. This is a chance to show the strength
of our movement and the power of our demand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8650?t=1045&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]JOIN US IN DC

★ ★ ★

Join us next Monday, May 22nd for our LIVE National Organize-to-Win
Broadcast with Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison to discuss his new
book Break the Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1046&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1047&akid=4276%2E5885482%2E2aIZD- ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

Pitch in $10 or sign up with a recurring donation of at least $5 and get these new stickers with our gratitude! [ - ]GET YOUR STICKERS ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] As we join Bernie and Pramila in the fight for Medicare for All, we also just kicked off our new campaign to End Medical Debt on our [ - ]LIVE Town Hall Monday with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our brave members who spoke out to share their stories. “Progressives are beginning a new offensive on Capitol Hill: Taking on America’s staggering medical debt,” [ - ]The Independent wrote of our campaign launch. “Headed up by Our Revolution, advocates around the country are gathering horror stories where lifesaving treatment often becomes a financial death sentence.” [ - ][IMG] Our patient activists (read some of their stories below) have been meeting with Ro Khanna and Bernie’s team as they get ready to introduce the Freedom from Medical Debt Initiative — and our organizers have big plans around the country. “It’s time to wipe the slate clean and cancel all medical debt,” Ro said. “This would pressure Congress and the White House to protect patients from the horrendous price-gouging and predatory debt-collecting tactics that bankrupt hard-working Americans every day.” [ - ]WATCH OUR FREEDOM FROM MEDICAL DEBT TOWN HALL HERE! ★ ★ ★ “The bill will say, if you have medical debt, it’s erased to zero,” [ - ]Ro told us Monday. “Hospitals need to wipe it out, they’re making way too much profit off of it. It’s affordable and it’s the first step to Medicare for All.” As OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ - ]explained at the town hall, we also have the leverage of federal funding, which makes up the majority of hospital revenue, that can be used to stop the pipeline of new debt. “Hospitals are federal contractors who receive hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars through Medicare and Medicaid,” Joseph said. “That means we the people have the power to withhold federal funding from hospitals that hurt patients.” “The president could sign an executive order that if you get federal funding, you can’t engage in price gouging, you can’t engage in predatory collections from individuals or we’re going to stop the hospital from getting federal funding,” Ro told us Monday. “We can stop the most egregious practices with the leverage that we have with federal funds. That’s why we’ve got to push the president to do it,” he said [ - ]in this clip. “You know, as it turns out with a lot of things, good policy that helps people turns out to be good politics,” Ro said. “If you do things that help people's lives, people tend to think that’s good politics.” "Medical debt is the number one reason for personal bankruptcies in the United States," Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told [ - ]The Hill. "We can stop that and the president has the power.” Covid-era Medicaid is drying up for millions, meaning more people will be pushed into debt, and as Biden gears up for re-election, taking action on medical debt would be a step toward earning trust and higher approval ratings. But, mostly, the President should do it because it’s the right thing. ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop predatory collection tactics. Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal! [ - ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT! ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] People are hurting and we know the root causes. An estimated 41% of Americans are saddled with nearly $200 billion in medical debt. It forces people to cut back on food and shelter, put off needed care, and put their lives on credit cards (as you’ll read below). Berneta Haynes of the National Consumer Law Center [ - ]talked at our Town Hall about factors of race, wealth, insurance status, and chronic conditions, but she also exposed the role of hospitals in America’s mounting medical debt crisis. Despite the ACA, hospitals are getting away with price-gouging patients, failing to inform them about their right to free care and aid, then resorting to predatory collections practices like placing liens on homes and wage garnishments. “Charity care accounts for about 1-4% of expenses at private, tax-exempt, nonprofit hospitals. We see top hospitals hounding patients for $1800 while raking in billions and sending people into a debt spiral,” Berneta said. “Then they claim that as part of their charity care - after ruining people’s credit, maybe their ability to get housing or a job.” ★ ★ ★ OUR REVOLUTION PATIENT ACTIVISTS “Elizabeth McLaughlin shared her account on the town hall of how treatment in 2017 put her tens of thousands in debt as she put utility bills and groceries on credit rather than face medical debt collectors,” wrote [ - ]Independent. “I got injured, then got sick. I was afraid they’d stop seeing me, so I paid the doctors and put my life on credit cards,” [ - ]Betsy told us. “I pass the debt from one card to another. In the meantime, I’m just grateful I’m employed, insured, and can keep making the payments.” “Every time you go it’s going to cost you more money, so it’s been drilled into all of us not to go to the doctor like we don’t deserve it,” said Betsy, who’s 62 and lives in Indiana. “It all comes down to one thing: healthcare costs too much and we can’t all get it. Denise Lyons, 70, of Michigan, spoke at our [ - ]Town Hall of her inability to retire from nursing or get the care she needs for multiple serious health issues. “I was diagnosed with diabetes and the second stage of kidney failure,” she said. “Now, she’s putting off biopsies and canceled her appointments with the cardiovascular specialist and the dentist because of high copays.” “I know putting off care is dangerous, but I can’t afford treatment or to go into more debt,” Denise told us. Kristin Noreen, 59, of Washington, [ - ]told us of her harrowing experience of being hit by a car while riding her bike in 2010, which led to traumatic brain injury, getting her hand reattached, and barely survived. “Like anyone, I thought I would be set for life,” she said. “If I’d have known how it was going to be, I might have given up. I’m glad I didn’t, but there’s no end in sight for this debt cycle.” Insurance failed to cover 100 percent of the $1 million total and subsequent care, so Kristin racked up $60k on credit cards. “I sold my home, my retirement account is gone, and I declared bankruptcy,” she told us. “I’m back up to $10k in debt, and I can’t work as much as I need,” Kristin said. “My parents took out a home equity loan, my friend paid for some dental care I needed. it’s a vicious cycle.” ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] “Sharing your stories is so important,” Ro Khanna told our members. “Congress members across the country need to realize that medical debt affects real people — it’s affecting their constituents and they should sign on.” Do you owe money for medical care that you couldn’t afford? Have you put life expenses on credit cards to pay medical bills? Share your story! Our goal is to feature voices from every congressional district in America. Join the hundreds of people already speaking out through our survey. [ - ]TELL YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Bernie, AOC, and Our Revolution are all-in for Helen Gym for Philly Mayor! Our Philly members will join them for a rally for Helen in Philadelphia on Sunday, hoping to repeat the magic progressives pulled off to elect new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson last month. “Just like we saw in Chicago, this contest in Philadelphia will come down to big money versus grassroots organizing,” Joseph Geevarghese, executive director of Our Revolution, told [ - ]The Hill this week. The Hill noted that Our Revolution is getting to work, putting our “mobilization muscle of 40,000 members in the city behind Gym.” And now, Helen is polling in the lead of this crowded race! “What we know is that progressives’ messaging on issues from public safety to education to good jobs and housing has resonated with the Democratic base in key cities, from Chicago to St. Louis,” Joseph said. “We are confident that this message, championed by Helen Gym, will resonate with Philadelphians on election day.” A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our recent [ - ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.” It’s time to turn out progressive super voters in Philadelphia, where we’ll be mobilizing our 42k members and making 300k voter contacts in the city. “Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.” [ - ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ Also in Philly, Our Revolution is proudly supporting Amanda McIllmurray, a working-class organizer who would be the first openly queer Council Member ever in the city! In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball umpire when she began organizing for Bernie Sander's presidential campaign and building local progressive power. “I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a family-sustaining job.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution backed Rep. Sara Innamorato in her run for PA House in 2018 alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to endorse for Allegheny County Executive - a key seat in Pittsburgh! With the progressive movement at her back, she’s now leading the establishment favorite by double digits in the polls, but we’re taking nothing for granted. As State Rep, Sara led dozens of bills for affordable housing, higher wages, environmental protections, reproductive healthcare, and much more. As County Exec, she’d have the power to directly affect people’s lives — from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the county jail to protecting abortion care. ★ ★ ★ VICTORY! With the support of the progressive movement, community organizers and San Antonio Council Members Teri Castillo (D-5) and Jalen McKee-Rodriguez (D-3) won their races for re-election! Teri and Jalen helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked with the community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that passed by one vote on the council. “We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing, workers' rights, and more,” [ - ]Teri told us. Also in Texas, Our Revolution-backed ballot measure Prop A passed in Austin, showing voters want to hold police accountable and deter the use of excessive force. ★ ★ ★ NEW ENDORSEMENT! Our Revolution is backing Aaron Regunberg for US Congress in a crowded race to replace outgoing David Cicilline in RI-1. "I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of Our Revolution, which was founded by Bernie Sanders and supports progressive leaders with track records of organizing broad coalitions to make a difference for everyday people,” Aaron told [ - ]The Boston Globe. “That’s what I’ve done here in Rhode Island by helping secure passage of paid sick days, higher wages, harm reduction strategies, and new clean energy programs — and that's what I'll do in Congress.” ★ ★ ★ We have a chance to elect several great progressives in Virginia on Election Day June 20th! For the State Senate, Our Revolution is backing Ben Litchfield (SD-27), Heidi Drauschak (SD-35), and Elizabeth Guzman; and for the State House, we’re backing Rozia Henson (HD-19). ★ ★ ★ We have a chance to build out progressive power at the city and state level where it can directly affect lives. The best way to make an impact on these races from anywhere in the country is to sign up to make calls with our team of volunteers. [ - ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ On Monday of this week, Our Revolution NYPAN activists were arrested alongside Susan Sarandon and OFW President Saru Jayaraman at an action calling for New York to raise the minimum wage and end the subminimum wage for tipped workers. Our state bill there has 33 cosponsors and growing because of all of you and your support, so we look forward to seeing NY step up and do what’s right. A reminder, if you want to get involved with our [ - ]Raise the Wage Team to organize state by state for better pay and an end to subminimum wages for tipped workers. ★ ★ ★ On Monday, Our Revolution will join another global day of action to Make Amazon Pay. This time, we’re demanding Amazon pay its writers as we support striking members of the Writers Guild of America! [ - ]Get involved with our global coalition holding demonstrations and showing solidarity across the internet with the hashtags #MakeAmazonPay and #WGAStrike. This struggle highlights how Amazon’s business extends across the global economy and threatens working conditions everywhere. It can also teach us the power we can build when allies stand together along supply chains and across borders. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Become a co-sponsor for our campaign to End Medical Debt, and Stand with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal in the fight for Medicare for All. Chip in $10 (or $5 recurring) and we'll send you these two new stickers with our gratitude. Members get both stickers with any donation of $5 or more. [ - ]GET YOUR STICKERS ★ ★ ★ Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop predatory collection tactics. Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal! [ - ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT! ★ ★ ★ On Wednesday, we’ll join Bernie Sanders, Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Debbie Dingell, and healthcare justice leaders to reintroduce Medicare for All! If you’re near DC, come out and show your support for universal, single-payer health care in America. This is a chance to show the strength of our movement and the power of our demand. [ - ]JOIN US IN DC ★ ★ ★ Join us next Monday, May 22nd for our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Broadcast with Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison to discuss his new book Break the Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police. [ - ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ - ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ - ]Facebook | [ - ]Twitter | [ - ]Instagram | [ - ]Youtube | [ - ]Website | [ - ]Sign Up [ - ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ - ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! | [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q0AokCDeTqiiNlH2mYo8JlnY0fvZE4_oJbkQC9xxQx6LNWFmqAsOxwepipdQfdy-SFiJQEIrTGwoCMref9-FGSuvCpYrcDclktqr7vhEUmCZUVXEMxPeyWeZTfAvF_YynahxqpTQKgOvg-UhLAMN7ug%3D)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q705qR1K6WcCfQ754xmsGQ2Iqh8FaN_FZ3sYP90JnSKWqjVk17xpiLeZCs569R2uYfHxMVuBQDOB6_px3gRvvLvqMs7LuHD8f4sO191HmbexOL-9yjM7x19J-IM7SpUhYNBHc0UaAPQDMPjPmald2Ho%3D)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q_3SD9xtW6ucX5oG-dY6l23fnDb5y8Mo1SdAxuZ4z2e2ASexwFGT33J4-8cRwyDoJQGpHM8RVtHG31wFGioaFd8972gZJQtVUtGr4b5gjbVM9dco-hhZapj8XZ6-P5gSXuPs9rEOkuY1C2lDwCWSEyQ%3D)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q4zxTvtG4h46UatkYlfCegSbJNCKWFQlG-e_MC-cB51hqldTzj-JubeZZZX7H7uq7MkxwQXvq1m0jntu4zae9Whf1xHR8L6WYDG0Oj-57e2gCPMJrdDjfFjUud6UOblRNr-sWtOGfBvoZZm-8FFwm0c%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q3FrsAlmTkai4lK7k7-SzQCSKHbxgKBDJQRhskfwP0mvGjnD0LxYghk3dDabfTghkdBuvAsryKSuIqwXRRCCm2pm0pVn2_5MRthDve6lyYv2i_BhbRqqW2oCb4DsN6KeL5fsEiAhJnoaBhrp7Wjc8yY%3D)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=83e4f0a3fd084d3580de2830a132051f&_e=Xu18iFaKuoZswe3vYYDXRdKmVlj2alnbX4U4qdAk4S33ozadwKAOI3R40AZ6vImTQe0gGqJGGYNT2bCjobkxaeFuXRQyjFi0W4Ff1NXadRRlfzLVZ3dGu-eRuxzGd94FmU9w5iacyv8-LPeEEhmfSYnDKv36v2gvYlpttk40SXV1SLhnIrlBpm4gs4QywBb9Pd6Fm9slG5e-k-rfIQ_2Hbh_tzN3XtDxyu8oE_QZNUUVRdp4zwXbVPTgPhrBh2l_GbjvYQrD2NwI_nRjGld0Q5_Qq5J2U51WzMOD8mQlyow0CWpcZG8YA0I05esiDGaxcj5AGTYotJuB9aX4H_10QIPPuL1v2eTrnGcbMGnay658V3rig-S0ccRAshqt0dFzqT7zRsqefSeZl7r9OIwY9OG8fbSqE0gSacjfIqhnJbo%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. | | Fellow American, I am sending you a different type of political email - mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign. When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a June 13, 2023 dinner event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Recently, Rep. Jahana Hayes strongly spoke out against the Limit, Save, Grow Act, which addresses the critical state of the current debt ceiling. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63247686/406106574/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZjYzNjOS1iM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slavj0gxbGBAt1OC38bvjnVYQor6MEShX_rmAE_5CKc=&emci=92c68425-68ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3efcc3c9-b3f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Team, Congresswoman Jahahna Hayes said it best, “I did not come to Congress to starve children.” Recently, Rep. Jahana Hayes strongly spoke out against the Limit, Save, Grow Act, which addresses the critical state of the current debt ceiling. This act, as Jahana has loudly admonished, would strip millions of Americans of benefits by expanding so-called work requirements in SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program). SNAP _already_ has a work requirement for individuals ages 18 to 49, but radical supporters of the bill want to expand this to older Americans and seniors who face age discrimination in the workplace already. **Folks****, 34 million Americans struggle with food insecurity – 9 million of them children. ** It's important to remember that many people who rely on SNAP _**are working**_ , but simply don't earn enough to make ends meet. It is _horrible_ that GOP extremists are choosing to hold the economy hostage and using vulnerable families as a bargaining tool, all while we are amidst an inflation crisis. [**Like Jahana, we strongly oppose this latest attempt at gutting vital programs designed to help Americans. If you can, we urge you to consider making a donation to our grassroots movement to continue working to support individuals and families who are struggling to put food on the table.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63247694/406106577/1183618966?refcode=E21433-20230513-GOPDebt-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZjYzNjOS1iM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slavj0gxbGBAt1OC38bvjnVYQor6MEShX_rmAE_5CKc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63247698/406106580/1183618966?express_lane=true&refcode=E21433-20230513-GOPDebt-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZjYzNjOS1iM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slavj0gxbGBAt1OC38bvjnVYQor6MEShX_rmAE_5CKc=)

Our state is facing some of the most significant election challenges we have ever seen. That's why we need your help with our fundraising goal. Every dollar donated will go right towards our efforts to flip GOP seats and protect Democratic ones from being flipped. With your help, we can help elect Democrats who will fight for the issues that matter most to Arizona communities, including access to quality health care, support for our public schools, and good-paying jobs. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: the CNN town hall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | The CNN Town Hall on Wednesday night made one thing clear: we can’t take 4 more years of Donald Trump.

From blatant lies about the 2020 election to making it clear he would pardon insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol on January 6th, to touting the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ as “such a great victory” — it is clear that Trump hasn’t learned anything.

My opponent last cycle had many of the same views, calling the Oathkeepers, who were intimately involved in the attack on the Capitol his “friends” and calling a woman’s right to choose “manslaughter.”

**And, NJ-05’s voters overwhelmingly rejected him.**

[Last year we banded together against extremism and showed that bipartisan problem-solving is the way forward. clean_body: | | The CNN Town Hall on Wednesday night made one thing clear: we can’t take 4 more years of Donald Trump. From blatant lies about the 2020 election to making it clear he would pardon insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol on January 6th, to touting the overturn of Roe v. Wade as “such a great victory” — it is clear that Trump hasn’t learned anything. name: Team Casey
subject: PA is going to be competitive, so we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob Casey.
| Folks,

Bob Casey is officially running for re-election to keep representing Pennsylvania in the Senate — and he needs all the support he can get.

The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob, and **PA’s historic competitiveness will make the 2024 Senate race among the most expensive and competitive in the country once again.**

[That’s why we’re coming to you to ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between Bob Casey and Voter Protection Project today? Whatever you can contribute will have a big impact on this race.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45059?t=6&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo) | [**CHIP IN $10 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45059?t=7&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
---
Bob Casey always stands up for the working families of Pennsylvania in the Senate. He’s spent his life fighting against the ultra-wealthy and the special interests that threaten our hardworking people — and he’s the first and only person to have won six statewide elections in Pennsylvania.

To win again, we’re going to fight for votes in each and every one of PA’s 67 counties. We’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again.

[If you’re with us, split a donation between Voter Protection Project and our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45059?t=8&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45060?t=9&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45061?t=10&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45062?t=11&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45063?t=12&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45064?t=13&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
No one knows PA like we do — and together, we’ll win.

Thank you,

Team Casey
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7687%2E878179%2E5E4soo)

name: Ann
subject: I really don’t enjoy reaching out with things like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Let me explain everything:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I come to you today with a heavy heart. I just met with my finance team, and our fundraising numbers aren't looking too good.

Each and every day, I am reminded of how much of a tremendous honor it is to represent MO-02 in Congress. I have met many great people and pride myself on all my work for Missourians.

I was born and raised in Missouri and am proud to be a loyal Conservative. I am a dedicated Christian and a former Ambassador. Additionally, I am a proud mother and grandmother. Since taking office, I have been focused on strengthening our economy, fixing our healthcare system, securing our southern border, and everything else in-between.

_But I can 't continue to fulfill my promises without some help._

So, I'm asking you this: _**[Can you chip in just $5 (yes, JUST $5!) to help me keep my promises? Anything you can give, no matter how big or small, will make an incredible difference in my fight.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zku8oud5f5c16lj0uit4v5g1is8obcnieo7qeca8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1i6aoj2c9h2bs "Can you chip in just $5 \(yes, JUST $5!\) to help me keep my promises? Anything you can give, no matter how big or small, will make an incredible difference in my fight.")**_
---
| | | [SUPPORT ANN WAGNER](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3n8vs32pvupnp6r0u4vlf7mphrogfhtmm1ema3g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1i6aoj2c9h2bs "SUPPORT ANN WAGNER")
---
I don't guarantee much, but I can guarantee you this - with your help, every promise I made to you in November will be advanced, and each bill I sponsor will be fought for, Friend.

_So please, chip in and support my fight for you. It will mean the world to me._

Sincerely,

Ann Wagner

body:
Supreme Court accountability: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv_Zp6YmnlrakPVwMt-L4gAIubfqVBeGOTaaViBVwEHKB73nTiHV_JFDsDZ04Lh8rMr0OD-ozcb-LM_nFkOihrn7ZELOSeqt9lYdb7YlV9otW7WGIjCeo3IUGMVtrxe2AfpPaZJuhf2CFKSUFk2NB5t8KwOF0uUqiykQQYJ5ttg1KL_7b8tkm6xvAQ7MmJu4603XJ9wpS8tP6Aa9wN35kHUsXWMpRe31EpQsYBuxcWklq9-SWtmb3dqEMJmYinB6z3/3w5/-1ZwlWzcTgGvKC_RNgcNTw/h0/QW1fZl5kcbl8xSlmS1d-ZoTZ3wEmab3MJwkO2KOcRXQ)
---
Friend, The American people deserve a Supreme Court we can trust to be fair and uphold justice for all. But the illegitimate, corrupt, far-right majority on the Supreme Court continues to target our rights and undermine our democracy. I spoke at a rally this month in Detroit in support of the Just Majority Coalition’s push for much-needed court reforms, such as expanding the number of Justices to restore balance to what has become an openly partisan, right-wing institution. In the midst of disturbing ethics scandals involving Justices Thomas, Roberts, and Gorsuch, it’s clear that we must also enforce a binding code of conduct so our Supreme Court Justices are held accountable for their ethics violations. [**Please sign on in support of expanding the Supreme Court and implementing a binding code of ethics for Justices. We must act urgently to stop the illegitimate Supreme Court from undermining our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARyBC95Q_4S95BLnKFRCu6oXEj55UISFGJbJWKjxr51K1tFjaThu6MsyuDHYnYGNTG5Z1ByfzsP96ocQgEoaNmEer0_vDHoJm9ygcXVAH8Yb6O8mNgQXjVhY4Dzq51dT2u5LQFxeZhKsXPfrqt9DQH_9vlqf1SMRhzl01WFR1IJsQhbVMkoGf6f-MkLAAWJPviHSQYBQOmSroRYjz3EvtHDSQSGQAxbnF4bLmfWztcyOUhbCI8D5l-I-wri5Jo9YWCjjbPEttncFMdqGs8A_owIcNqDqJkSooJlbP4fJEkBdy0BbDRclX3H78L3mXQB-KW9R2T3rgJCp4i2TrmCA1RXO2bf1gYMikFnNucZg534AVJOnAgBvso_76EVyxiPbJX/3w5/-1ZwlWzcTgGvKC_RNgcNTw/h1/dmtAAQ3Xwtzj2Q1o0Y3IXPujD6MHG4dPnaeFuj3h58c) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARyBC95Q_4S95BLnKFRCu6oXEj55UISFGJbJWKjxr51K1tFjaThu6MsyuDHYnYGNTG2Eg3fNOmwfWZy9KNAA2uuR04sI_Dq2bZIY-LR-PpajkDDAkeTCcf758fAz-e6RJ9YBcwDzMjFhwuVUnHHPXVuLR_7qWg4vgnQhfA_amSRi1Ds1wWIVOMx-0qD4LzqGn5ZjNLyM7s-Cw5SPWIwStWFyfuBMFlhgJ4QvlSgAU4d1X1deuleEyBWmu-ff5SX-PB0s4915qB3vEOSX6tbfLmKodOt9DZ8Au_vyRwytUgP4uVMf5s6EwK-I6Y0fIISNu7Ez8luSTXeNlr1pbyoyPiMgK00qrlHhMobwuKDgvNcYAa6_BzU4-XT2VIt8XZ9Td1/3w5/-1ZwlWzcTgGvKC_RNgcNTw/h2/5sJXTTGN8Iy9P94MgTxSBcK3Hm05hNbbci2jyDuUPoA)

Rashida

body:
| | | Fellow American, I am incredibly grateful.

Since my opponent hauled in record amounts of cash, we’ve had an incredible outpouring of support from grassroots patriots like you.

**But right now, we’re STILL falling behind.******
**[My mid-month deadline is just two days away, and we MUST meet our goal if we’re going to catch up. This race WILL decide control of the Senate, and I’m counting on you to help us win. I can’t do this alone, and we’re running out of time: will you pitch in NOW to help us meet our mid-month deadline?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=85505e17334f41279a0935eb5b87c6de&_e=vV4mAMEKrkWsMvfOvsp6xF-I_bZj75SX757nZYc9OKAPmZvgFYwXjBq_ZF00IjjOjIXe3gB3FJJEP8O0SNtk2TAWF4AEq9j2IvAcRhQqX4EhayZZBnQSOv84GfwYxMhzVVeaqBwfp-qdS1EEsNxyDpd5DbUlQsvZHgdksho9fyiT_rmEPMZUig7lRSNiFPS2N0vfIabicL7tGTaBVnmOEhi0ErnHHHT82hhW04V3CRRdVZp63c-ndlPWUKs5WX-Jgy3JAg9o9OdA4FaVXNekuvdGzT1-jC6z6FTabzOfDT-Q-JAcM1P4FSELcjxeXTfgY7WwklK_qSoXl8EIthMA2zTp66sxAtvvk8P0Rfc1s2s5gyh4QJiUQnzq5Lrlkbuo8SAXouIcCi0vWcR5kEY56A%3D%3D)**

As the Democrat party fully embraces socialism, I don’t want to lose the great state of Missouri to the radical Left.

And with the mainstream media and big tech in the Democrats’ pockets, it’s going to be an uphill battle.

_But luckily, I have the toughest patriots in America on my team._

If we meet this deadline, we’ll be one step closer to taking back the Senate and undoing the unbelievable harm Joe Biden has done to our country in the past few years.

_But if we miss it, we might lose Missouri for good._

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63250216/406114323/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjNmOTZlZi1iOWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE5EPJr9KXhus_NULkR8fKAG22p6ydSPbYzoXB6hr3o=)
Team, **Happy Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month!** This month is a time to honor the contributions, culture, and resilience of the AAPI community that has played an integral role in shaping the vibrant tapestry of our nation. The AAPI community has a long history in the United States, with individuals hailing from diverse backgrounds, cultures, and traditions. From pioneering achievements in science, art, literature, and business to fighting for civil rights and social justice, AAPI individuals have made invaluable contributions that deserve recognition and appreciation. However, we must also acknowledge the challenges that the AAPI community has faced throughout history and continues to face today. Over the past year, we have witnessed a distressing rise in acts of discrimination, harassment, and violence against AAPI individuals. It is up to us to stand together and advocate for an inclusive society that rejects hatred and fosters understanding. Together, we can foster an environment where diversity is celebrated, inclusion is the norm, and everyone feels valued and respected. Let us stand united in recognizing the AAPI community's extraordinary contributions and ensure that their voices are heard. Together, we can build a society where diversity thrives and inclusivity knows no bounds. Sincerely, Eric Swalwell
