clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I am incredibly grateful. Since my opponent hauled in record amounts of cash, we’ve had an incredible outpouring of support from grassroots patriots like you. But right now, we’re STILL falling behind.** As the Democrat party fully embraces socialism, I don’t want to lose the great state of Missouri to the radical Left. And with the mainstream media and big tech in the Democrats’ pockets, it’s going to be an uphill battle. But luckily, I have the toughest patriots in America on my team. If we meet this deadline, we’ll be one step closer to taking back the Senate and undoing the unbelievable harm Joe Biden has done to our country in the past few years. But if we miss it, we might lose Missouri for good. ** Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

| Peter,

I know you’ve received a lot of messages from my campaign team recently about how important our early campaign work is to winning another election. _**I wanted to reach out personally to put that sentiment in context.**_

For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment. National Republican groups want to flip VA-07 **red** badly, and they’re willing to pour millions into our district to do it.

Their investment leads to countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards. They’ll mobilize their field forces to campaign against me and the good work I’ve done in Congress. And they’ll recruit prominent national figures – just like Ted Cruz last cycle – to visit Virginia to support my eventual opponent.

All this means we have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory because of the community we have behind this campaign. _**So, why does early investment matter?**_

It allows us to scale up our campaign team early and build a strong foundation for success. We can purchase campaign materials like yard signs and literature to get the word out about my candidacy, and we can defend my track record and stand up to Republican attack ads.

This network is the life force of our campaign, [_**and I’m counting on your support in the 2024 cycle and beyond. subject: Will you help us surprise our favorite person ever, Peter? 💟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
Hello from Sen. Heidi Campbell’s whole family, Peter!
We know that Mother’s Day isn’t until Sunday, but that’s just one of two important days for Heidi coming up—Monday is also her birthday!
Peter, Heidi is the hardest worker we all know, the most loving wife to me (Andrew), and a wonderful mom to us (Atticus and Campbell), as well as to our pups (Saffie, Cinder & Poe).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
Heidi has always had a unique gift for bringing people together. When she made the decision to be a public servant for life, we all knew there was no better person for the job.
Normally, we like to set aside extra time to celebrate Heidi’s birthday and Mother’s Day, but this year is unlike any other. She’s been working as hard as we’ve ever seen her both in the Tennessee Senate and on her campaign for Nashville mayor.
From dusk until dawn, she's focused on spreading her campaign's constructive plans for 1️⃣ reducing traffic, 2️⃣ expanding affordable housing, and 3️⃣defending against the state's hostile takeover.
That’s why today, we’re reaching out to ask: can you chip in any amount to help us surprise Heidi and support her campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
💟 CHIP IN 💟 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
Peter, Heidi already got a pretty amazing gift this week when 📊poll results 📊 came out. (She's in 1st!). We were all so proud to see her deservedly in the leading candidate spot for the Nashville mayoral race.
If there’s anyone who can step up and put Nashville first, it’s Heidi.
But she can’t do it alone—especially when some of her opponents are self-funded millionaires.
Every day, we see first-hand how dedicated Heidi is to serving our community and we want her to know how much her hard work means to everyone in Nashville.
Peter, can we count on you to help us surprise Heidi by showing your support for her campaign for Nashville mayor with a contribution of any amount today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
We can’t thank you enough and hope that you all have a wonderful Mother’s Day weekend!
With gratitude,
Heidi’s Family (Andrew, Atticus, Campbell, Saffie, Cinder & Poe)
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230513_em_fr_b1_HF_30_90_10_AllD]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

clean_body: Reproductive rights are on this line this weekend | | | | | Hey Peter, We’re in the final stretch in the special election for HD-163 and the polls have the race too close to call. This race will decide the majority in the state House. If Katie Ford wins, the radical Republicans in Harrisburg will have the votes to push through a constitutional amendment banning abortion. This is our last chance to reach Delaware County voters and make sure they know the truth about Katie Ford and why she’s downright dangerous for Pennsylvania. = = Heather Boyd winning this special election is the only thing standing between us and a constitutional amendment completely banning abortion .We literally can’t afford to lose this race. We’ve got a plan to mobilize the Democratic voters we need to win, but in order to be able to execute we need resources.Elections in Pennsylvania always come down to turnout. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = This weekend could not be more crucial in the fight to defend reproductive rights in Pennsylvania. Can we count on you? \-- The PA Democrats | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. = Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. If you need to update your contact information, please . If you don't want to receive future email updates from our campaign, you can click here to unsubscribe: If you'd like to receive text messages from PA Dems, text JOIN to 70504. **_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Friend,

We founded Their Future PAC because our leaders are ignoring the 73 million children in America. In Congress, Republicans just passed a budget bill that would cut funding for critical programs that children and families across the country rely on.

The GOP’s extreme budget plan cuts funding for schools and child care (including Head Start early childhood education), food assistance programs for low-income children and families, and programs that support students with disabilities. The budget also makes it easier for polluters to poison our environment and jeopardizes access to affordable health care for children and Americans of all ages.

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. We need to speak with one voice and tell our representatives in Congress that they need to get serious, stop these partisan and dangerous bills, and start centering children and families in their policy decisions. Our goal is to build a better future for our children by centering them in public policy decisions and holding leaders and lawmakers accountable for their actions. From school boards and state houses to the House and Senate, Their Future PAC is working hard to advocate for children across America.

**[Right now, we need to fight back against the Republican budget that would cut funding for critical programs that support children and families in every community. | Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63251348/406117732/-922949292?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230513_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGYwY2I1Ni1jMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMMRn2y84Tq-BNwrxXOxe3u_5jlKBnvBK3LILEuKQ6k=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63251349/406117736/-922949292?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230513_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGYwY2I1Ni1jMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMMRn2y84Tq-BNwrxXOxe3u_5jlKBnvBK3LILEuKQ6k=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63251352/406117737/-922949292?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230513_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGYwY2I1Ni1jMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMMRn2y84Tq-BNwrxXOxe3u_5jlKBnvBK3LILEuKQ6k=)

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. = I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress. As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | = I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House. His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage. Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter. And I know that those experiences drive him every single time he walks into his office in D.C. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Debra | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Letitia James' to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63251901/406118770/1337142349?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1083-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcwZDgwZS1jMWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-BUTvG-EOyvFQy_LbGCzObuFp5RYyRkGBOcrslXfvY=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. = | | = \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Colin Allred Date: Tue, May 9, 2023 Subject: I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz | | | = Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Letitia James' to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to be split between Colin Allred and Letitia James' campaigns: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In only 3 days, we can ensure millions of Americans are safer, happier and healthier.
body:
May 16th special elections
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T425c71cc-05c9-468d-bed3-770b547ba1c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_In only 3 days_ , we can ensure millions of Americans are safer, happier and healthier.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T793b5147-c3c7-4aad-a8e7-927885e624fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_On Tuesday, an election for 2 open Pennsylvania State House seats will determine whether Democrats retain their current one seat majority, or MAGA Republicans take over and make Pennsylvania's schools and malls more dangerous, threaten women's rights and threaten our democracy._** _We must support Democrat Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn, who has vowed to block the permitless carry of guns to protect our kids. We must fight to ensure liberty doesn't die in the very state where it began._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef016e22-8fec-4454-b92f-b73b419f4c72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Boyd & Finn to fight for our basic rights and stop the authoritarian policies of MAGA Republicans._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51bcc950-9c0a-4601-8aba-dffbeb623515/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

| | | | |

---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/paspecialelectionsin3days-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0254fc78-e39c-4462-88ae-cde37d581e25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

All eyes are on this race. And it’s not just a hunch: CNN and Roll Call recently released their ratings of Senate battleground states for 2024 – and Pennsylvania is on _both_ lists. To keep up the pace and raise the funds we’ll need to defend this seat, we’re launching a mid-month goal to raise $10,000 in online donations by May 15. **[If we’re going to defend our Democratic Senate majority, we’ll need your help to win here in Pennsylvania. clean_body: All eyes are on this race. Peter, Here at Casey HQ, there is one thing that we think about every day: all eyes are on our race. Defending this Senate seat is going to be an uphill battle, and the fight to maintain our Senate majority could come down to Pennsylvania. And it’s not just a hunch: CNN and Roll Call recently released their ratings of Senate battleground states for 2024 – and Pennsylvania is on both lists. To keep up the pace and raise the funds we’ll need to defend this seat, we’re launching a mid-month goal to raise $10,000 in online donations by May 15. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Casey PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. We're making history in 2024, Fellow American!

I am committed to reviving the American Dream and taking the America First movement further than President Trump.

_**We have a long road ahead.**_

Our first goal is to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage in August where I can offer my vision for our country and its revival. But, there are certain numbers I have to hit, which include strong polling numbers and *importantly* invested unique grassroots donors.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

highly contested state from the 2020 Presidential election due to voter fraud and Zuckberberg funded drop-boxes.

The alliance is reportedly backed by the [Center for Tech and Civic Life](https://substack.com/redirect/ab490deb-5833-4c17-aef3-d3f6bf88c062?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which partnered with Zuckerberg to spend $45 million in Georgia elections."
Following reports that Georgia received almost $45 million in Zuckerbucks during the 2020 election, the Georgia state legislature created legislation to ban the use of Zuckerbucks in Georgia, and [the bill was recently signed into law by Governor Brian Kemp this month](https://substack.com/redirect/acd8c5fc-936a-45c9-9fbf-f3859332003d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on May 4, 2023.

Raskin is also one of the ringleaders of the Soviet Style, January 6 Committee. **

Given that President Trump is likely to be the GOP nominee for President in 2024, it is highly unethical for Raffensperger, who will be overseeing the election in Georgia, a key bellwether state, to be engaging in such partisan behavior with a Democrat Congressman who is actively pushing for charges of seditious conspiracy to be brought against President Donald Trump.
**While speaking at the CEIR conference with Raskin and CNN reporter Kyung Lah on May 8, 2023, Raffensperger said,**
> **" We hold our primary on Tuesday, March 12, 2024. I said, whoever can win in Georgia will win nationally. If you can win in Georgia, you can win anywhere, and you will win nationally."
> **

Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d8fd16ffca17414ab219969cddf327e4&_e=rFM4oOLiWwZsMzPQzg045lm51aaiG2N0vBp_33cDcarG-HTK3MTiQisJ0H9dLcHEmQ0N5mNHdgw-ZChREpqdt3zuv0E318HiLM6n4BWmA4ujVa5TsqL8zN5BIITz4tZlnbzJ8v7yaGrhJOfFFhb9PU8YWmFrqzqBoSvHnpIYVgqmpOPFcLucuabAHfTDKJUrJXyHMfUn3xI9YHyr5vW0vyLNm5gWFeC0ND4m0IXRXNXke9X_tzjGHHU1TrWIPZZfjvWZhae10ItU8A3dQZARQd9N_xSkO5LgG0jEQW-ewVODkAvfzkiiaGfYMKzOADKY1TtTWxfxnVTOJwqtN7PpNA6JGq6J6vISPKUKYxG5dneJy440AnsvuMtKBrm2ONHOyXzJ7jUf3M_Yxu2gD0r8gEPQkI6o2mlvcSFMUl4ibZw%3D)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d8fd16ffca17414ab219969cddf327e4&_e=rFM4oOLiWwZsMzPQzg045lm51aaiG2N0vBp_33cDcarG-HTK3MTiQisJ0H9dLcHEmQ0N5mNHdgw-ZChREpqdt3zuv0E318HiLM6n4BWmA4ujVa5TsqL8zN5BIITz4tZlnbzJ8v7yaGrhJOfFFhb9PU8YWmFrqzqBoSvHnpIYVgqmpOPFcLucuabAHfTDKJUrJXyHMfUn3xI9YHyr5vW0vyLNm5gWFeC0ND4m0IXRXNXke9X_tzjGHHU1TrWIPZZfjvWZhae10ItU8A3dQZARQfYDowkfece7M-Hsd9__0b0vxAKCIO-TIay2o1jTeo0do8z2pXM9GdGNm94y2sQTzmOAzJuUI6_HsxcZYkksgunTFJJR6uk8CSABZNIubcrEPd_QLxlWC35NM7mZI3FLzqto6k9LXMwcFaplxgEaJAw%3D)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d8fd16ffca17414ab219969cddf327e4&_e=rFM4oOLiWwZsMzPQzg045lm51aaiG2N0vBp_33cDcarG-HTK3MTiQisJ0H9dLcHEmQ0N5mNHdgw-ZChREpqdt3zuv0E318HiLM6n4BWmA4ujVa5TsqL8zN5BIITz4tZlnbzJ8v7yaGrhJOfFFhb9PU8YWmFrqzqBoSvHnpIYVgqmpOPFcLucuabAHfTDKJUrJXyHMfUn3xI9YHyr5vW0vyLNm5gWFeC0ND4m0IXRXNXke9X_tzjGHHU1TrWIPZZfjvWZhae10ItU8A3dQZARQYRt27cCsN35P7qYqCEpWXoNnrHG1Qf2e326__mtiyF9VaOvx2Vlc9jO21JdiwcrzjHowawkq5Fnfba2i8oHFNhI9-m0EDQxkrodX9EM3U4NMvLNuIP8qbFlVFyLeldUQsGAxkP2uV7-nvNbIzhVzA0%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d8fd16ffca17414ab219969cddf327e4&_e=rFM4oOLiWwZsMzPQzg045lm51aaiG2N0vBp_33cDcarG-HTK3MTiQisJ0H9dLcHEmQ0N5mNHdgw-ZChREpqdt3zuv0E318HiLM6n4BWmA4ujVa5TsqL8zN5BIITz4tZlnbzJ8v7yaGrhJOfFFhb9PU8YWmFrqzqBoSvHnpIYVgqmpOPFcLucuabAHfTDKJUrJXyHMfUn3xI9YHyr5vW0vyLNm5gWFeC0ND4m0IXRXNXke9X_tzjGHHU1TrWIPZZfjvWZhae10ItU8A3dQZARQULkl3QGGYvHqbZkVmdBoIW9sTfO7ZC1BjbmJ7NnfMndNMDUHtLKnoc9n5k_GhgbRqf84yCidyECK3x0nP0HYVf8cL84aNE-McsN4vROgDJaqSHf1oIucXlVm8kEKgdk_hzUHmUnu7uZ6_7s_RTDu9Y%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter,

**Earlier this week, the NRCC launched its first wave of attack ads targeting Kim for opposing Kevin McCarthy's reckless debt ceiling proposal.**

This isn't the first time they've targeted Kim, and it certainly won't be the last. In 2022, Republican groups spent over _$8 million_ to attack Kim. From now through Election Day, we're expecting the attacks to continue.

That's why we're counting on your support to fight back, Peter:

name: Team Cori
subject: Read Cori's story this Mother's Day weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Please read Cori's story about almost becoming a statistic.
#
Peter, this Mother's Day, we want to highlight and uplift the maternal health care crisis Black people face in our country.
**Every day, Black mothers, birthing people, and our babies die because our doctors don't believe our pain.**
Please read Cori's story about motherhood and almost becoming a statistic below.
We're sending lots of extra love this weekend to those who need it.
—Team Cori
* * *
_Content warning: This email contains mentions of medical racism and pregnancy trauma.___
I'm a single mother of two. Zion, my eldest child, was born at 23 weeks gestation versus what is considered a normal pregnancy at 40 weeks.
I had hyperemesis gravidarum which was severe nausea and vomiting for the first four months of my pregnancy. Around five months, I went to see my doctor for a routine prenatal visit. As I was sitting in the doctor’s office I saw a sign “If you feel like something is wrong, something is wrong. Tell your doctor.” _I felt like something was wrong. So that's what I did._
**I told my doctor. I told her that I was having severe pains and she said, “Oh no you’re fine, you’re fine, go home and I’ll see you next time.”**
I went home and one week later, I went into preterm labor. At 23 weeks, my son was born one pound 23 ounces. His ears were still in his head. His eyes were still fused shut. His fingers were smaller than rice and his skin was translucent — a Black baby, translucent skin. You could see his lungs, he could fit within the palm of my hand.
**We were told he had a 0% chance of life.** The Chief of Neonatal Surgery happened to be in the hospital that morning and saw my case on the surgical board, and decided to try and resuscitate him. It worked, and for the first month of his life, Zion was on a ventilator fighting to live. For four months, he was in the neonatal care unit. The doctor who delivered my son apologized. She said, "You were right and I didn't listen to you, give me another chance.
Two months later I was pregnant again so I went back to her. At 16 weeks I went for an ultrasound at the clinic and saw a different doctor who was working that day. I found out again I was in preterm labor. The doctor told me that the baby was going to abort. I said “No you have to do something.” **He said “Just go home, let it abort. You can get pregnant again because that’s what you people do.”**
My sister Kelli was with me, we didn’t know what to do after the doctor left. In desperation, my sister picked up a chair and threw it down the hallway. Nurses came running everywhere to see what’s wrong. A nurse called my doctor and she put me on a stretcher. The next morning my doctor finally came in, placed a cerclage on my uterus, and I was able to carry my baby — my daughter, my Angel, who is now 20 years old.
**That chair flying down a hallway is what desperation looks like. This is what being your own advocate looks like in our broken health care system.** Every day Black women and birthing people are subjected to harsh and racist treatment during pregnancy and childbirth. Every day we die because the system denies our humanity. It denies us simple care.
I'm writing to you as a single mom, as a nurse, as an activist, and as a Congresswoman committed to doing the absolute most to protect Black mothers, to protect black babies, to protect Black birthing people, and to save lives.
Thank you,
Cori
* * *
[**If you want to help power the fights ahead of us, make a donation today to show support for our movement as we continue legislating and organizing for change.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230513.AQWOHC&refcode=em20230513-2687&t=1&akid=2687%2E1082990%2E0sqniK)

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230513-2687-footer&t=2&refcode2=2687_1082990_0sqniK&akid=2687%2E1082990%2E0sqniK) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

With great Republican leaders across our state, we’ve been able to achieve countless wins for the people of the Sunshine State.

_And the more the Left sees our success, the more they want to destroy it._

Right now, we have two days to defend this district, and I can’t do it alone.

subject: Legislative Update for Week Ending May 12, 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
A momentum of historical legislative accomplishments! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8167e2bc2a00/n41kepo7ku-525358?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d01e0aa5e0&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update for Week Ending May 12, 2023
* Taxes
* LIFE
* Infrastructure
* Election Accountability and Voter Verification
* Energy Concerns

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update for Week Ending May 12, 2023
---
| It was another eventful week at the Unicameral. A lot of big topics we discussed in our Legislative Plan were addressed. SIGNIFICANT tax reduction, infrastructure, pro-life, and protecting the children all took center stage. Article IX Section 6 Clause 2 charges the Executive Committee of this party to carry out the legislative plan (approved by the Central Committee) ‘insofar as possible’. Identifying candidates and working with our legislature to try and achieve these goals of Republican citizens continue to be my focus. With that said, there was significant movement in our legislative plan this week.

Let’s dig in...
---
|
## Taxes
---
| In the economic section of our legislative plan, the party voted on two key goals to drive our economy.
* **Reduce the burden of local property taxes by increasing state aid and curtailing spending**
* **Provide a fair and regionally competitive personal and corporate state income tax rate**

These two goals took one big step closer to fruition this week. LB243 and LB754 both passed the second round of the legislative process and have moved on to “Final Reading” (the third and final step in the legislative process). Senator Briese has been the leader in property tax reform for years (LB 243). This bill will provide over $3 billion of relief in property taxes. Furthermore, caps on growth were put in place on school districts (the caps can be violated with a “Large Threshold” vote of the public or school board). The elimination of a community college tax assessment at the local level was refreshing.

Immediately after property tax relief was achieved, the second round of income tax relief occurred. Senator Linehan was the primary driver of the income tax relief bill. LB754 will provide over $3 billion in tax relief and begin to reduce our published income tax rates to make us more attractive to both labor and business. In addition, LB754 addresses social security and federal pension payment tax issues to incentivize our retirees to stay and retire here in Nebraska. Child tax credit issues were also addressed to ease the burden on working families.

A few of the provisions had to be reduced to meet fiscal constraints that occurred after the fiscal footnotes were published after round one. The Democrats tried to create objections that would trigger the elimination of certain tax reductions if revenues fell. The Republicans held firm and cited that taxes could be raised in a future bill if a shortfall occurred...but they were not going to budge and give easy outs to quickly raise taxes to the other side.

There was a price paid for these cuts. Large spending increases were given to the educational lobbies and system. All eyes will be on the systems to create better results with these large expenditures. We need accountability to results (especially in our larger urban areas).

However in the end, this was a monumental day for tax relief across this state. We are thankful for the efforts of our senators and are grateful a big need of this state was addressed. One more round to go!
---
|
---
|
## LIFE
---
| This week’s hot topic was life. Our legislative plan stated the following:
* **Protect the unborn child, restrict abortion, and honor the sanctity of every human life**

As we stated in a previous edition, the party desired an amendment in a bill to address the Pro-Life issue after the Heartbeat Bill did not pass a cloture vote. Contrary to what the Democrat pundits are saying, we never had a vote on the Pro-Life issue in the last round. We had a failure of a cloture vote that would have ended debate on the topic. A vote on the bill did not occur. In our previous edition, we expressed the idea that we would push forward amending another bill. To be clear, the NEGOP was not privy to the new legal language or the bill that this issue would be addressed in. This was determined by the senators. However, to reiterate, we did push strongly for an amendment to occur because our State Central Committee voted into the Legislative Plan to protect the innocent unborn. The body was frustrated by a no vote in 2022 on the issue and a strong Pro-Life state like Nebraska needed a vote on the record in 2023.

With that said, a Pro-Life amendment (12 week), was authored into the Let Them Grow Act. The Let Them Grow Act is centered around limiting gender altering procedures of minors until they become adults and can make these permanent decisions for their life when they are of age (19 years). This combines two of the most discussed topics of the session into one bill. Even though the Let Them Grow Act passed the second round of debate in the past, the Pro-Life amendment will force the bill to be considered at the “Select File” level (2nd round) again. We encourage you to call our senators to protect the lives of children. We encourage you to be at the Capitol on Tuesday evening to counter the radical left who plans to be loud. The senators voting for life and kids need your support!
---
|
---
|
## Infrastructure
---
| In one of the more under-the-radar stories of the week, Senator Bostelman addressed our failing infrastructure by bringing legislation forward on the 'bridge match' program. Last year, the Central Committee set the following goal:
* **Build a premier infrastructure system including roads, bridges, pipelines, and broadband**

Senator Bostelman’s key legislation continues to address deteriorating, and in several cases, failing bridge infrastructure that exist around the state. The legislation requires the counties to put skin in the game if they identified a need. This legislation backs up local financial commitment with state funds to address these bridge issues. Republican citizens made it clear to leadership that bridges are suffering around the state and they need to be addressed. Senator Bostelman stepped up and addressed this problem. His proposal was met with overwhelming approval and will be a great tool to address bridge problems.
---
|
---
|
## Election Accountability and Voter Verification
---
| Election Security continues to be a hot topic after the city election in Lincoln. I’ve received messages from senators on their concerns with Photo Voter ID. The key players in these decisions are Senator Slama, Senator Brewer, Secretary of State Evnen, and Attorney General Hilgers. I have had conversations with each of these elected officials (or staff) on this issue and we have made our position very clear. We see the need for the Nebraska Constitutional Amendment to be followed to a “T” (you can read previous editions of this letter to learn more) because it significantly addresses both of the issues in the plan. The legislative plan as voted on called for the following.
* **Require voters to have photo identification and eliminate ballot harvesting**

I was able to sit down with Secretary of State Evnen to discuss the issue of “Early Voting” in the Lincoln elections. I think it is only fair for Secretary of State Evnen to express his opinion on early voting in his own words and how he sees the issue. This discussion and request for his opinion on early voting was had on Wednesday. I’m hoping to obtain his views in his own words on this issue for the benefit of Republicans next week to move the discussion forward. Securing and winning elections is a key issue for all Republicans.
We are still waiting on the final text of the Photo Voter ID bill that is agreed upon by these individuals. There is pressure being put on this bill from a MULTITUDE of groups. The NEGOP is more concerned with the Constitutional law as written being followed as voted on by the people. Laws in contrast with Constitutional law would be dangerous. We will let you know as soon as we know the text they are going with to see the interpretation of the senators that have the votes.
---
|
---
|
## Energy Concerns
---
| The EPA continues its war on power plants across this nation. These new rules will hurt energy reliability as well as significantly drive up energy costs. The Nebraska Examiner published an excellent article on this subject [epa-again-proposes-power-plant-carbon-rules](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=456d255704&e=25844e23a8). Couple these directives with ESG initiatives to drive up costs (insurance premiums) on plants and you quickly see the spiraling costs to Nebraska in energy that will hurt our homes and businesses alike. We encourage you to call our reps in Congress and push back. The party was clear when it passed the following:
* **Policies providing abundant and affordable energy for Nebraska’s homes, communities and industries **

These EPA policies, as well as ESG initiatives against our energy sector work against the goal of abundant and affordable energy.

Until Next Week...

We need you at the Capitol on Tuesday, May 16th around 6-7pm! Protect Nebraska’s children! LIFE matters.
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
NEGOP
---

---
| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a89410a2ec&e=25844e23a8)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: MAKE HISTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b2aa31083d44c3c9e68511e58ca4128&_e=TVqa9VfJB71lrwLLTTr3rDJuMsfIIR8AtCjVI22S8xJrV_WmHBqTybztnYbyztjnbstPcHorsGMPDhCEuTXquCySEWUyyXe33ZChO7acHN0eMBph1EqGNKs9ukP867aJ3B9XJoJQRtmEF7Va-ZqTduCUL4Z8EowqjaROSeGy9vpThE1KRp9Lson565InMkK0H_ugcdocAMYKs1-OANuVAZYAuXT5J6KhunRt6FuEygRw2qH5tLecAyN6hFFmofSjkBK7bzrB8wOCNb1qHz3wgwxZMqfOrQB75OYRYgvbTrOshhxpoIl4gIITi-zA33BVjiaX4FPWnbXAi69JoPh6qPCNQHEOpIaxQokta1NqlRBS6-QFAQg_QYgdAtlFKurxSUYGdDAH_KY8NGUMFsczFg%3D%3D)

name: Jon Tester
subject: Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.

| Peter, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target, and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today.

[_**Split a donation of $25 or more between Fight for Progress and my campaign to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate majority.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63259753/406129531/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230513-1-EM&amount=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYTRhZGEyLWNlZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZRZ0bzGo3fmD_5LOb1KyfeTuf-fB2s395p2gFmKKlvI=)

clean_body: Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024. | Peter, it's official. Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024. That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target, and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, but it won’t be easy. Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win. Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us, getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and much more. Don’t forget, Republicans came within 4 points of winning our district last year, so we know they’ll do whatever it takes to defeat us in 2024. The path to reclaiming a Democratic majority in the House runs through competitive districts like ours, but Republicans have already named me a top target in the next election.

**We need to do everything we can to win here in Rhode Island and to elect more Democrats across the nation.**

As we can see with the GOP debt default crisis, the Republicans aren’t serious about governing and are happy to risk economic disaster to appease their extremist base.

We need to retake the majority so Democrats can get back to strengthening our economy, creating jobs, and delivering for all Americans.

[If you can, please chip in $10 or any amount today to support our campaign before the weekend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63259960/406130055/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230513_FR_mmfr.1.2_0_6MO_sethmagazinerhq_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWM1OTkxZS1jZmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=28lHIutvaTJsoorhSbey2QoVdhZ7VJdHrpOVaMvdcyQ=)

Seth

[**May 13, 1982:** The Chicago Cubs made history by becoming the first Major League Baseball team to achieve 8,000 victories. In a game held at the Astrodome, the Cubs secured a 5-0 victory against the Houston Astros with stellar performances from Allen Ripley and Lee Smith, who combined to shut out their opponents. The milestone was reached in the 15,337th game played by the Cubs, marking a significant accomplishment in the team's rich history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8cbd998ac0e74dffa355081c948c3615&_e=S4ALQNA9NouOHSWCL8hhPv0thAhl7uuj02aVY0pZLkzRllXbjRToQQlgDWmHNSUAnKORElICToE9pyd7Um0Oik2YkSdjWZE4nXb8veHLI77Q2aokV0_JmSSDgoFnvZd_x5aPe0mL7-zZJHTg7rtGEKxYZhf7Z6o6LoTcRV9y1FugNpffdI225fdrKTIfkItDOuKfp-dPSs2_Ko9Ni2Si9ToNDO6rpXp1MMW1y6ZK3RXv0nNX7QhMJoF39pYUoneTJqQsH-ROYqOEZdVIarmttUK0Npu6cK1h3HOiKCW32g6N6VTFRTcEdBqn-r-Mjuq6Kwh2xBU2eUy90jDor0YVFKYssxl_6DRLvOv_en7czSl-ncYuXt0RiIH61ffXxshJzG5suI9tOpPTIQJ6eqW7FYQM1qSYbfmZSJjrBNw2PFeJmB7-oBpiab0pT8obOfMXWzmfLq8ZOj0Dhuq7j99gaw%3D%3D) **Source -[thisdayinbaseball.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8cbd998ac0e74dffa355081c948c3615&_e=S4ALQNA9NouOHSWCL8hhPv0thAhl7uuj02aVY0pZLkzRllXbjRToQQlgDWmHNSUAnKORElICToE9pyd7Um0Oik2YkSdjWZE4nXb8veHLI77Q2aokV0_JmSSDgoFnvZd_x5aPe0mL7-zZJHTg7rtGEKxYZhf7Z6o6LoTcRV9y1FugNpffdI225fdrKTIfkItDOuKfp-dPSs2_Ko9Ni2Si9ToNDO6rpXp1MMW1y6ZK3RXv0nNX7QhMJoF39pYUoneTJqQsH-ROYqOEZdVIarmttUK0Npu6cK1h3HOiKCW32g6N6VTFRTcEdBqn-r-Mjuq6kENpelLl_ZKYLGbSQG7fbzi6ylCmI64lu07TVTRBNparKovneWlB4fPTgLwjta-PkCc23XqVcUo0cL4AuKlaAuHxbY_edbVlbAl9A1fAoqoeNbZkMLsBXxudPWWPfXW40lzivyA6aSttZjlvfY1vGg%3D%3D)**

[**May 13, 1992:** This significant event occurred when three astronauts ventured outside the spacecraft into space, marking the longest spacewalk ever carried out by American astronauts. name: Border Alerts
subject: Our border is on fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
Our country is on the verge of being completely transformed.
| A flood of illegal immigrants are heading towards every community in America.
Title 42 has just ended, and now the invasion has begun.
If you think our border was bad before, just wait.
Our country is on the verge of being completely transformed.
We’re hoping, begging, PLEADING with every Patriot reading this message to add their name to BRING BACK TITLE 42.
---
| [ **BRING BACK TITLE 42** ](https://email.updates.electcommonsense.com/c/eJxckUGPnSAQxz8N3jQww-rz4GF3jemhlx7aw14MwriSAFLBvrxv3-izbdIb-c38Z_iB8tHZ-dGx5o0BLNYkBsDwlQHsU_3hv7_e7m_lB5b-6w86SvDOAPIj0t--a0RFXll30KYvTCd1OxtVUCfqm-QC8AWKpSMpYULDG6B6utV64i1K0MiF1I0xc2E74ID8RSAIAdBWisQspNGIHCdsJZN8j0ZlShU50lmv3q8hUUhU6dUXrltyjum82sBgSKT3jaq7DRuZo4PBcAbLZ7I8owyGbLOjUkK5zAyHPfvRk7G7Z9hfZvUB07pvmhj2QbvxUr9KWvmo7Gdg2D8VysuFj6TTeC6QMP4S4zKfJEQ1mj06q1Wmf6c_49aQKeTnqnJY_Pyev2w_dwb1GJw1DPv_4Pl92H9Ti4uPYutMvFvnbKobJvnnIXE8wO8AAAD__9F_oJ4)
---
By the time you’re done reading this message, THOUSANDS of illegal immigrants will have crossed into our country.
It’s an INVASION!
Our border is a WARZONE, and something needs to be done right here, right now.
Please don’t ignore this message.
Please don’t turn your back on our border.
| |

name: Ryan Deeter
subject: an abortion ban in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for State Senate
body:
Peter,

This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature just passed an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours.

**Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.**

[**Will you rush a split contribution to the North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus and Hala Ayala today to help us fight back against Republican extremism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63260452/406132007/1493698427?refcode=EM_FR_230513NC-IA_N_RD_IA_7_NG_N_L1&fn=Peter&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVkYjllOS1kM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npyAYqtTDuLXSChqT_vEIa5KFt5gT7awWBSdylnHcow=) ****[Split a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63260453/406132008/1493698427?refcode=EM_FR_230513NC-IA_N_RD_IA_7_NG_N_B1&fn=Peter&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVkYjllOS1kM2YxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npyAYqtTDuLXSChqT_vEIa5KFt5gT7awWBSdylnHcow=)**** This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until a late Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda.

North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. clean_body: Peter, This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature just passed an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours. Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back. = **= This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until a late Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda. North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent. We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the North Carolina Democratic Senate Caucus and Hala Ayala: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = ** Thank you for standing with us, Ryan Deeter Executive Director, North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus Paid for by Hala for State Senate Hala for State Senate P.O. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: veterans’ healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Some thoughts about the latest debate in Congress and a story about why it’s so personal to me
#
Peter — Congress spent 20 years voting to send us out to fight and die in their pointless wars, costing us trillions of dollars.
But now whenever it's time to pay the bill for the care we were promised, the SAME politicians act like we're broke. **It's nothing less than theft.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 toward my campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) But first, let me tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and why this issue is so personal to me.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)**
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger by voting against legislation to protect veterans who were exposed to these toxic burn pits.
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
After serving for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps, I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33025?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33024?refcode=em20230513-3115&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230513-3115-footer&t=13&refcode2=3115_614464_ZaBIOl&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=3115%2E614464%2EZaBIOl). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8279f14c040a42f09c0ab7b6253ff97c&_e=WXeP5d7XT7NGL_8XfWBhHqp_BSBHuqVBxFWXvCtsjYXGDIhdCOj_zsA5YVjj2zJM6A_iBR3A66W_2FgJH1mCq7ou-3uxgQgdUHOHh_ijRZKV0SVyoAhA1G6zwCR9GU0MN1tpzSJI7-N1cvX7p9gaB2uWTjoUUmg_3k1PguPWPKXJIhnFoTibyr4bW950o_YZMVfxao0hgcaKXvXnx48DEr0UXCe9ZHH_EArUds7fqWnsdOxVyh5w1XKX8zfjedBzditLwsdXjm3SUXIpxOGx_Cs2SDffLTmAXexMvLInh5LxwGuhrJOHF0LqfOOijQvgDpQJtqDh-fFPkFBubVAeIuGgIomxWZoMTJd-jWzRnBx3cQwvbegJlj2-tbGsI21PispST1912CMgMTNPEsrATeOhEclB8_3trtY3Yf8E71o%3D)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8279f14c040a42f09c0ab7b6253ff97c&_e=WXeP5d7XT7NGL_8XfWBhHqp_BSBHuqVBxFWXvCtsjYXGDIhdCOj_zsA5YVjj2zJM6A_iBR3A66W_2FgJH1mCq7ou-3uxgQgdUHOHh_ijRZKV0SVyoAhA1G6zwCR9GU0MN1tpzSJI7-N1cvX7p9gaB2uWTjoUUmg_3k1PguPWPKXJIhnFoTibyr4bW950o_YZMVfxao0hgcaKXvXnx48DEr0UXCe9ZHH_EArUds7fqWnsdOxVyh5w1XKX8zfjedBzditLwsdXjm3SUXIpxOGx_MWKhyuLphi_PTKxDsYe0ofIu_REdX_3pT_xMcFbUB2gc3wsd2wwMDlGHY15IBM0Bljuy3UDgbuR3a5W5QqA27iW3nJfYTmGZU_3UYtiAguzvxECFko3_-HBhSEZhPljh5VMFrkdaEgVoxcfKX8p46k%3D)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8279f14c040a42f09c0ab7b6253ff97c&_e=WXeP5d7XT7NGL_8XfWBhHqp_BSBHuqVBxFWXvCtsjYXGDIhdCOj_zsA5YVjj2zJM6A_iBR3A66W_2FgJH1mCq7ou-3uxgQgdUHOHh_ijRZKV0SVyoAhA1G6zwCR9GU0MN1tpzSJI7-N1cvX7p9gaB2uWTjoUUmg_3k1PguPWPKXJIhnFoTibyr4bW950o_YZMVfxao0hgcaKXvXnx48DEr0UXCe9ZHH_EArUds7fqWnsdOxVyh5w1XKX8zfjedBzditLwsdXjm3SUXIpxOGx_Jy_w4cOmLFYtQ4XjvrZCQG3h-7Au7pIKm144aCsKEbnSIUCrfGSF5cOWZ_JSppDIpDPZUTq7OaHXphWHSBrPu_oiGI6PFDJM1q5zky7j4QJ8qwTrY_TsciMpUfkItwBnN1jprjtJPL7y9U1C6Smzbg%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Grizzly bear just found brutally shot near Yellowstone
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770778?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Death of grizzly bear found just outside of Yellowstone is currently under investigation! ** Imagine you are roaming along the open grounds of Yellowstone National Park. You’re a grizzly bear in search of food to bring back to the den for you and your cubs. The wilderness is your home, and these are your native lands. You don’t have any concept of state lines or the politics that go into “protected” boundaries. You happen to unknowingly wander just off of Yellowstone property having no idea that outside the park, vicious trophy hunters are waiting to _viciously slaughter you._ Suddenly in an instant, you are pierced with a series of painful bullets that rip through your thick fur --**you feel nothing but agony as your last moments on this Earth come to an end. ** _**Just a few weeks ago, the bloody carcass of a mangled grizzly bear was discovered, and it likely suffered a similar horrific fate.**_ While the murder is still under investigation, the DEAD bear was found only 14 miles away from Yellowstone -- in a location where grizzlies are at high risk of Endangered Species Act rollbacks by GOP lawmakers and hunting lobbyists. **[Friend, with grizzly protections on the chopping block right now, this newest bear death is a CRUCIAL time to stand up and defend these helpless animals from brutal trophy hunters. Will you take action immediately?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770779?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770780?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
While this most recent grizzly death happens to come at a time when political tensions around ESA protections are heightened, it’s sadly not unusual for these iconic mammals to be _**VIOLENTLY SLAUGHTERED.**_
_**Trophy hunters are absolutely ruthless and show NO MERCY when it comes to getting their kill.**_ They will indiscriminately fire away at harmless grizzly bears, including mama bears searching for food to bring back to their helpless cubs. These innocent babies will likely **die of starvation or hypothermia** if their mama doesn’t make it back.
We cannot let the special interests of corrupt politicians and the hunting lobby seal the fate of these beloved mammals. We must **END** these senseless acts of animal cruelty and **STOP** the inhumane slaying of innocent grizzly bears NOW before this iconic animal is** _WIPED OUT._[But if we’re going to get the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service to protect grizzly bears from vicious trophy hunters, we need you to step up today. Will you use your voice to defend our precious grizzly bears before we run out of time?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770781?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1770780?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting bears,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
A few folks who donate through this email might get a call from me. | | |
---
Since my very first campaign, getting to talk one on one with supporters has been one of my favorite parts of running for office. Hearing your stories and your hopes for the future inspires me to keep going day after day. So, to show my sincere gratitude for each and every one of you who are helping build this campaign, my team is going to pick a few Founding Donors to get a call from me. **Will you pitch in $25 to become a Founding Donor to our campaign today? I’d love to get a chance to give you a call to say thanks.**

The second _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, far-right Republicans began undoing abortion protections for women across the country.

In Florida, a 6-week abortion ban was signed into law.

**Friend, the GOP narrowly took back the House in 2022, and ever since, it has been a NIGHTMARISH few months in Congress (and for this country). **
The extremist GOP has threatened a national abortion ban and cuts to Social Security and Medicare. They refuse to act to end the gun violence epidemic in America, and they are doing everything in their power to block Biden's progressive agenda. **We can't let them keep the House in 2024.**
