With President Trump’s Bedminster Dinner Contest nearing its close, we simply had to be sure you didn’t miss his last email.
As a special **THANK YOU** to our incredible grassroots donors, President Trump is offering **YOU** a chance to join him at his beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the day before his birthday) for a once-in-a-lifetime dinner event.
_**But we noticed that as of 9 AM this morning, you had yet to enter!**_
If you win, President Trump will take care of EVERYTHING for you and your guest: your flights, your accommodations, and your tickets to the dinner.
_You’ll even get to take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this special evening._
YOU are the bedrock of our campaign to SAVE AMERICA, Friend, and there’s no one the President would rather celebrate with than you.
_**So please, don’t delay! Enter to WIN before the contest officially closes.**_

clean_body: Will you be joining President Trump for dinner on the eve of his birthday? | | Friend, With President Trump’s Bedminster Dinner Contest nearing its close, we simply had to be sure you didn’t miss his last email. As a special THANK YOU to our incredible grassroots donors, President Trump is offering YOU a chance to join him at his beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the day before his birthday) for a once-in-a-lifetime dinner event. But we noticed that as of 9 AM this morning, you had yet to enter! If you win, President Trump will take care of EVERYTHING for you and your guest: your flights, your accommodations, and your tickets to the dinner. You’ll even get to take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this special evening. YOU are the bedrock of our campaign to SAVE AMERICA, Friend, and there’s no one the President would rather celebrate with than you. So please, don’t delay! Enter to WIN before the contest officially closes. | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like YOU are my only special interest. Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors – no matter the amount of your gift – to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event! name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63260988/406134423/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWRhZTkzMS1kYWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX9nkk_dGYTr4GVsa0jcgpo-Z5KgzUdh5elHLgti8DA=)
Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: [Will you give $5 or more before midnight tonight to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63260989/406134424/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWRhZTkzMS1kYWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX9nkk_dGYTr4GVsa0jcgpo-Z5KgzUdh5elHLgti8DA=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**
**[That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63260990/406134425/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWRhZTkzMS1kYWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX9nkk_dGYTr4GVsa0jcgpo-Z5KgzUdh5elHLgti8DA=)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | = Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American. But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” The long and short of it is I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you. = With gratitude, Sherrod Brown | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

subject: Adam just took Matt Gaetz and Jim Jordan to task
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Sometimes
the best way to expose Republican hypocrisy is by confronting them
directly.

That’s what Adam just did on the committee that MAGA Republican Jim Jordan
chairs.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]Before we explain, can you rush a $10 contribution to Adam’s campaign
to help him take the fight to MAGA Republicans in the Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=may2023_abs_em.VrKnFM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

You see, another MAGA Republican — Matt Gaetz — thinks it would be a
bright idea to abolish the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and
Explosives. He’s introduced legislation that would do just that.

That’s right — with mass shootings every day and week, he wants to abolish
the agency trying to enforce existing gun laws, and crack down on gun
crimes and gun trafficking. With all of the horrific gun violence, hate
crimes, and threats of white supremacist terror that have spiked all
across the country in recent years, we’re sure you will agree with Adam
that this isn’t such a bright idea.

So Adam asked: “Mr. Chairman, Mr. Jordan, would you like me to yield to
you to express your support for Mr. Gaetz’s legislation to defund the
ATF?”

Jim Jordan: “I’m gonna yield to Mr. Gaetz.”

Adam: “No, I’m yielding to you, Mr. Jordan.”

Jim Jordan: “I support Mr. Gaetz’s legislation to send a message to the
ATF.”

Adam: “So you support the legislation to defund the ATF.”

Jim Jordan: “I didn’t say that. I said I support the legislation to send a
message to the ATF.”

Adam: “It says it would abolish, it would eliminate the Bureau immediately
after enactment. Do you support that? Yes or no.”

Jim Jordan: “I’ve given my answer, Mr. Schiff.”

Adam: “Okay, I guess your answer is that you don’t support it, or you’re
afraid to say that you do.”

Adam offered to yield to each and every MAGA Republican on the committee
and answer the simple yes or no question.

But no one had a straight answer about whether they were willing to
abolish an entire federal law enforcement agency. (Except Gaetz, of
course, who introduced the dangerous idea.)

Derek, Republicans have to walk a fine line. They thump their
chests and decry defunding the police, while indulging the far-right
extremists of their party who fought the police on January 6th and trying
to abolish whole federal law enforcement agencies.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]Adam is working every day to hold MAGA Republicans accountable and
defend our democracy. But he needs your help. Can you chip in $10 today?

Even as Adam campaigns for the Senate, he’s continuing to do everything he
can in the House to fight back against the extreme far-right majority led
by the likes of Jim Jordan, Matt Gaetz, and Kevin McCarthy. And he’s so
grateful to have you with him.

Thank you,

— Team Schiff

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2023_abs_em.FKV_Cj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2221%2E5257348%2EtwYkYm ]DONATE MONTHLY

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63261126/406135132/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230513_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwNTk3ZjEtZGRmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sPiDHcGRQ5Xux53nR1rJrtvUy3kyTHfXM3QHRmGqp88=)

Something’s happening in Ohio that’s not getting enough attention right now: Republicans are trying to change the state’s Constitution to prevent voters from protecting abortion. For over 100 years, the Ohio Constitution has allowed for voter-proposed amendments to be added to the Constitution if a majority of voters approved. Now, fearing the popularity of reproductive rights and the likelihood an amendment protecting abortion would pass, **Republicans are trying to change the rules.** They want to place additional hoops to jump through in the process, as well as raise the bar for what is needed to pass. **All over the country, Republicans have decided they’re playing by their own rules. In Tennessee and Montana, they’re expelling lawmakers they disagree with. And now in Ohio, they’re literally rewriting the Constitution to ensure the will of the people can be ignored. ** We can’t allow this kind of behavior to stand. We must fight back against these anti-democratic actions by Republican lawmakers, call attention to their hypocrisy, and then vote them out. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: New York is on the front lines in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I need Democrats like you to fight for the future of my state.
I know it's easy to write New York off as a solid blue state, but it's just not that simple. **_Last year my state was one of the ONLY states in the country to experience a red wave._** It was so powerful that it helped Republicans flip FOUR House seats, handing the House majority to Kevin McCarthy.
And the stakes will only be higher in 2024. The GOP's megadonors know that defending their victories in New York is crucial to maintaining control of the House. And at the same time, they have their sights set on my seat to take back the Senate too.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63261135/406135170/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4139-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UyYTY2NS1kZWYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lVvjTiTdCtlmB1wTm8WBBeXpIpJV9IUL4_3-awhxYA=)
Make no mistake here: **The path to retaking the House and defending our Senate majority runs right through New York.** This state is on the front lines of the fight for the future of our country — and it's a fight that we cannot lose.
As the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket this year, you have my word that I will do whatever it takes to win this fight. **That's why I've set a huge $50,000 mid-month goal — my biggest so far this year. Last year my state was one of the ONLY states in the country to experience a red wave. name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Should we raise the voting age? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* CEO sounds the alarm on **[Air Traffic infrastructure](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-y/)**.
* Will Biden **[pardon Hunter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-j/)**?
* **[Racism](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-t/)** is alive and well in Colorado!
* The [T**exas Mall shooter**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-i/)**** was briefly in the Army.
* **[War on dishwashers](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-d/)**.
* Biden **[eats like a toddler.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-h/)**
* Tucker Carlson will**[air his show on Twitter.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-k/)**
* Trump**[ordered to pay.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-u/)**
* Proof of**[Biden Family crimes](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-o/).**
* Texas is**[protecting their border](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Rep. **[George Santos](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-m/) **was arrested.
* **[Central Park campground](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-c/)** for migrants.
* Did you watch Trump's **[CNN Town Hall](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-q/)?**
* The Depart of Energy **[wants you to be hot](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-a/).**

### **Raise the Voting Age**
Republican presidential hopeful Vivek Ramaswamy is **[voicing support for changing the U.S. voting age to 25.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-f/)**
### **Four Years From Now**
**[Migrants are opening their DHS packets](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-z/)** after being released into the wild and finding court dates in 2027! CBP estimates more than **[530,000 have gotten away](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-v/)** without fancy phones and court dates. **Risk of Power Outages** The Biden administration**[released a sweeping plan to curb fossil fuel-fired power plant emissions](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-e/), **sparking concerns from experts about future U.S. power grid reliability. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrjrjl-trhiujldw-yk/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

We hope you’ll step up and become a member today. | | | | | We saw you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. And as one of our most active supporters in your community, we wanted to reach out to you personally to ask you to join our team. We’re looking for supporters who are: ✅ Enthusiastic about building Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide by expanding our majorities, narrowing margins in GOP-controlled chambers, and investing in our target states; ✅ Supportive of our Democratic agenda to protect abortion access, expand gun safety measures, and defend voting rights; and ✅ Passionate about fighting right-wing extremism in the states by defeating Trump’s state-level allies in elections across the country. As a grassroots supporter fighting for Democratic values in your state and nationwide, you’re a perfect fit – so we’re counting on you to take the leap and join this team as an official member. ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | As a member, you’ll join a community of 16,000+ Democrats from every state in the country who (like you!) are working to lay the groundwork to expand our majorities, build Democratic power, and fight back against right-wing extremists.
